snippet.title: Lord of Mysteries: The Clown [English Sub]
snippet.description: Lord of Mysteries unfolds in a captivating otherworld, a stunning blend of VictorianEurope and steampunk.Our story follows Zhou Mingrui, who wakes up in this fascinating world, embodying Klein, ahistory student who meets an untimely and mysterious death. His ordinary life gives way toan unexpected transformation, endowing him with powers and precipitating him into awhirlwind of time-traveling adventures.Zhou also becomes part of a prominent Beyonder institution, navigates a territory fraught withperil, and unravels the intrigue behind his summons to this world……

snippet.title: One-Punch Man (Season 3) [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Saitama is a hero who only became a hero for fun.
After three years of "special training," he’s become so strong that he's practically invincible. In fact, he's too strong—even his mightiest opponents are taken out with a single punch. Alongside Genos, his faithful disciple, Saitama performs his official hero duties as a member of the Hero Association.
One day, monsters claiming to be from the Monster Association suddenly appeared, taking a child of Hero Association executive hostage. The S-class heroes gather and plan a raid on the Monster Association hideout to rescue the hostage. Meanwhile, Garou, a "human monster" who was taken by the Monster Association during a battle with the heroes, awakens in the Monster Association hideout.

snippet.title: SPY×FAMILY Season 3 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
In an era in which the nations of the world were waging a fierce war of information, Ostania and Westalis had been in a cold war state for decades. 
Twilight is one of the best spies from Westalis and he has been charged with the top-secret mission to keep his eye on Desmond, a key figure from Ostania who is threatening the peace between the East and the West.
His mission is to "Establish a family and infiltrate the social circle at the prestigious school his target's son attends.
However, the daughter Twilight meets is a telepath who can read people's minds and his wife is an assassin! 
The peace of the world rests in the hands of a family of three hiding their true identities from each other.

snippet.title: Unlimited Gacha [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Anime Full Title: 《Backstabbed in a Backwater Dungeon: My Trusted Companions Tried to Kill Me, but Thanks to the Gift of an Unlimited Gacha I Got LVL 9999 Friends and Am Out for Revenge on My Former Party Members and the World》

The Goddess once created nine races. Among them, the weakest and most ridiculed were the humans. Light, a young human boy, was fortunate to be welcomed into the Concord of the Tribes, a party made up of nine races. For a time, he was happy. However, it was all a fleeting illusion. What awaited him was betrayal in the world's largest and deadliest dungeon, the Abyss. Light manages to survive, and at the bottom of the Abyss, he discovers the true power of his gift of Infinite Gacha. Crawling back from the depths of despair, Light goes on to build the mightiest kingdom. With his unique gift of Infinite Gacha in hand, the curtain rises on a tale of revenge that will shake the world!!

snippet.title: A Gatherer's Adventure in Isekai
snippet.description: Takeru Kamishiro is just a regular office worker. However, when he wished for a slightly different day, he was reincarnated into a world of sword and magic! He is also gifted with physical enhancement, incredible mana, and the "Search" ability that allows him to see the value of the materials he found! And so, Takeru begins his second life gathering materials. Surrounded by the unique but lively friends of an ancient dragon cub, a mischievous elf, a lizardman warrior, and a beautiful divine horse, Takeru's trip in another world has begun!

snippet.title: Private Tutor to the Duke's Daughter [English Sub]
snippet.description: Allen failed his court sorcerer exam. The world is harsh. He doesn't even have the money to return to his family home. While searching for work, Allen is offered a job as the private tutor for a duke's daughter. It sounds suspicious, but surely she can't be more trouble than that "albatross". Just as he lets his guard down, he finds himself face-to-face with a girl completely unable to use magic?! What exactly is blocking her ability to use magic? Allen's unconventional lesson that defies common sense gently illuminates the girl's future.

snippet.title: I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire! [English Sub]
snippet.description: "I'll become an evil lord and do as I please!"Liam is a reincarnator who became the head of the family at a young age. He was born into a count's household that governs the frontier of an interstellar nation, the Algrand Empire.Reflecting on his previous life, where his kindness led to constant loss, he now resolves to live as an evil lord, the one who takes from others and oppresses his people!"Since it's a sci-fi world, I want to pilot robots!""I want to master the strongest swordsmanship and act as recklessly as I please!""Eventually, I dream of building a harem and indulging in a life of luxury!"However...Even though Liam thinks he's acting like an evil lord, for some reason, his people are grateful, and his popularity keeps rising!Set in an interstellar nation filled with magic and robots, a misunderstanding tale of territory management on a super-galactic scale begins!

snippet.title: WIND BREAKER Season 1 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Anyone who causes pain, who brings destruction, who holds evil in their heart will be purged by Bofurin without exception!

Where the average scores are the lowest, but the fights are the strongest. Furin High School is renowned as a super school of delinquents. 
Haruka Sakura, a first-year student, came from outside the city to fight to the top.  
However, Furin High School has become a group that protects the town called the “Chime of the Wind Breaker” – Bofurin.

The heroic legend of high school delinquent Sakura begins here!

snippet.title: BanG Dream! Ave Mujica [English Sub]
snippet.description: "I did ask you to entrust the rest of your life to me, didnt I?"Sakiko Togawa's band, Ave Mujica, which she brought together, had achieved commercial success through live performances and media appearances.A girl who had lost both the companions she swore to share her destiny with and the home where she was born and raised.Why does she continue to carry the weight of others' lives and persist with the band?Hiding both her past and her true self behind a mask, tonight she once again descends into a perfect miniature garden.What you are about to witness is the story of a girl burdened with secrets.

snippet.title: MOMENTARY LILY [English Sub]
snippet.description: Momentary Lily will follow the daily lives of High School girls surviving in a world ravaged by otherworldly invaders. Cooking together, battling mechanical monstrosities with their iconic weapons, and uncovering the secrets of their mysterious past and world, all of these moments and more will appear in GoHand’s unmatched visual style!Yuri Kawazu, Erika Kodaiji, Hinageshi Usuzumi, Renge Kasumi, Sazanka Yoshino, and Ayame Sakuya know only each other and a world that’s been torn apart by mysterious mechanical creatures. That’s not going to stop them from making the most of their lives together, though! Equal parts slice-of-life and slick action, Momentary Lily will entice and entertain with its entirely distinct story and visuals.

snippet.title: Even Given the Worthless "Appraiser" Class, I'm Actually the Strongest [English Sub]
snippet.description: Ein is an Appraiser, a job that is considered the weakest and most underprivileged, whose only skill is Appraisal. His peers treated him horribly, ridiculed and called him a "rubbish picker". Unable to like himself, he spent his days in self-loathing.His destiny then takes a drastic turn when he meets Yuri, a spirit of Yggdrasil, as well as Ursula, Yuri's guardian.As Yuri gives Ein the Spirit Eye, he undergoes rigorous training under Ursula to master its power. As Ein grows stronger, he embarks on a journey to fulfill Yuri's wish to meet the other sisters of Yggdrasil.With his inherent kindness and newfound courage, Ein overcomes numerous challenges on his path.

snippet.title: From Bureaucrat to Villainess: Dad's Been Reincarnated! [English Sub]
snippet.description: Kenzaburo Tondabayashi, a 52-year-old diligent public employee, died after a traffic incident… Or that was what's supposed to happen. When he wakes up, he finds himself reincarnated as a character from the world of the Otome game that his daughter loves, "Magical Academy Love & Beast". He is reincarnated as Grace Auvergne, the villainess who obstructs the love life of the game's protagonist, Anna Doll. And so, Grace Kenzaburo tries to act like a villainess just like how the original Grace was. However, due to his life experience, he views Anna through the eyes of a parent and gives her advice. Along with his "Elegant Cheat" which translates his plebeian manner into something elegant, he inadvertently raises his popularity and raises the flags of the capture targets. The weapon you need to survive in another world is not swords or magic, but the Old Man Skill that one has cultivated through living in society!

snippet.title: I Want to Escape from Princess Lessons [English Sub]
snippet.description: Leticia has undergone rigorous princess lessons since childhood as the betrothed of Prince Clarke of Astar. However, deep down, she longs to fish, climb trees, and live freely! Hoping for their engagement to be called off, Leticia witnesses Prince Clarke escorting a mysterious woman at a ball one day. Her heart leaps at the thought of the prince changing his mind, but... Clarke isn't ready to give up on marriage! Leticia wants to escape her princess lessons and live freely. Determined to chase after her, Prince Clarke expresses his sincere affection. Thus begins a chaotic and heartwarming battle between a princess candidate who wants to break off the engagement and a prince who wants to marry her!

snippet.title: I Left my A-Rank Party to Help My Former Students Reach the Dungeon Depths! [English Sub]
snippet.description: "I quit!" Boldly declares the Red Mage Yuke as he walks away from Thunder Pike, an A-Rank party he has been part of for five years. Unable to endure being underestimated—no, outright ridiculed—by the other members, he finally abandons his prestigious position. While searching for a new party, Yuke reunites with three of his former students—Marina, Silk, and Rain—and joins their group. Encouraged by the girls who still admire him as their teacher, Yuke unleashes his unparalleled magical prowess and skills. By drawing out the best in his teammates, he leads them to triumph after triumph in their quests. With the help of the broadcasting artifact Camerat, Clover begins live streaming their adventures, steadily building a reputation that spreads across the land. Their ultimate dream? To conquer the most formidable labyrinth of all: The Colorless Abyss. But as they tackle dungeon after dungeon in pursuit of their goal, they find themselves gradually drawn into a maelstrom of chaos that threatens to upend the world itself—

snippet.title: Beheneko: The Elf-Girl’s Cat is Secretly an S-Ranked Monster! [English Sub]
snippet.description: Ruine, the city of Labyrinthos, where monsters run rampant within a maze-like dungeon, is home to countless adventurers.The protagonist, who lost his life and was reincarnated, wakes up inside the dungeon. And instead of a human, he looks just like a kitten!? But his true identity is that of an S-rank disaster-class monster... He's turned into a baby Behemoth!He encounters Aria, a novice D-rank adventurer. Mistaking him for a kitten, Aria takes the severely injured protagonist back with her to treat his wounds. She names him "Tama" and keeps him as her pet. Touched by her kindness, Tama vows to become Aria's knight and protector.Utilizing his S-rank abilities, Tama explores the dungeon alongside Aria. He'll meet a variety of unique companions, and sometimes be the subject of way too much cuddling, as his days as a knight (pet) begin!

snippet.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 3 [English Sub]
snippet.description: ▶️ 《Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-》 🔥 Full Series Playlist： https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl3RN7t6wesJqlUkSUN6FHKF＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝The highly anticipated third season of the hit light novel series from MF Bunko J, Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-, is finally here!A year has passed since the liberation of the Sanctuary, where Subaru Natsuki repelled Elza's deadly attack and forged a contract with Beatrice in their battle against the Great Rabbit. Now united, Emilia's faction enjoys peaceful and fulfilling days while preparing for the Royal Selection. However, these quiet days come to an end when an emissary arrives with a fateful letter.It was an invitation to the Water Gate City of Priestella—one of the five great cities of Lugnica—sent by Anastasia to Emilia, from one royal candidate to another. They accept and head for Priestella, where they soon encounter several reunions—one unexpected, one coincidental, and one fated.As evil stirs and unprecedented crises loom beneath the surface, Subaru Natsuki is about to confront yet another harsh fate.

snippet.title: The Most Notorious “Talker” Runs the World’s Greatest Clan [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A hero known as "Over Death" has a grandson named Noel. Noel admires his grandfather and aspires to become the strongest Seeker. However, the job he possesses is classified as the weakest support role, "Talker". Despite inheriting his grandfather's will and putting in extraordinary effort to become a powerful explorer, Noel could not bridge the gap created by his natural talent.
Nevertheless, he uncovers a path to becoming the strongest through his rare and exceptional cunning. By gathering companions, creating the strongest clan, and becoming its master, he aims to outwit enemies and lead his team to unprecedented heights. The most fearsome "Talker" paves the way to becoming the strongest, using any means necessary.

snippet.title: Let This Grieving Soul Retire [English Sub]
snippet.description: "Let's be Treasure Hunters! We have only one goal: to become the strongest heroes in the world."Among the six people who have made that vow, only one young man is particularly untalented.One day, as he expresses his frustration, his childhood friend says to him.""Krai, you don't have any role in particular, so why not become our leader?""The ""Grieving Soul"" party, formed by the extremely talented monsters (childhood friends), has made a name for themselves throughout the Imperial capital within a few years, and Krai, being the top of a party, is promoted to the top of the strongest party.Due to the high expectations of those around him, his words and actions are often misunderstood, and the situation takes an unexpected turn...This is the heroic tale of Krai Andrey, filled with glory and pain, the leader of the strongest party, known as the strongest Clan Master!

snippet.title: Loner Life in Another World [English Sub]
snippet.description: Haruka has been living his high school life as a loner, but all of a sudden, he and his classmates are summoned into another world. A God gives him a list of skills he can freely pick... Or at least that was how it was supposed to be, as all the valuable skills have been taken by the other classmates first. After Haruka scolded God, he snapped back and gave all the remaining bad skills to Haruka. Thanks to the "Loner" skill, Haruka begins his lonely adventure in another world.

snippet.title: DAN DA DAN [English Sub]
snippet.description: When high schooler Momo, from a family of spirit mediums, first meets her classmate Okarun, an occult geek, they argue – Momo believes in ghosts but denies aliens, and Okarun believes in aliens but denies ghosts. When it turns out both phenomena are real, Momo awakens a hidden power and Okarun gains the power of a curse; together, they must challenge the paranormal forces threatening their world.

snippet.title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword [English Sub]
snippet.description: 【Synopsis】A boy named Will enrolls in a magical academy, aspiring to become a full-fledged mage. Despite his hard work, he has a fatal weakness as a mage. It is that he cannot use magic at all. Facing cold stares from classmates and teachers, and at times feeling disheartened, Will presses on with determination. Unable to wield a wand, he takes up a sword and battles in a world where magic reigns supreme. He believes in the power that only he possesses and fights to keep a promise he made to someone important to him.【Staff】Original Work: Fujino OmoriManga: Toshi AoiDirector/Series Composition/Script: Tatsuya YoshiharaCharacter Design/Chief Animation Director: Sayaka OnoMonster Design: Raita Sunaga, Harada Yoshiro, Ryo AkizukiProp Design: Ryo AkizukiColor Design: Naomi NakanoArt Director: Yuki MaedaArt: Studio EasterDirector of Photography: Ayako OtsukiPhotography: animocaramelCG Director: Morihito AbeEditing: Masato YoshitakeSound Director: Hiroto MorishitaSound: Jinnan StudioMusic: Yuki HayashiMusic Production: LantisOpening Theme: PENGUIN RESEARCH "Fire and Fear"Ending Theme: TRUE "Frozen"Animation Production: Actas & Bandai Namco Pictures

snippet.title: Fairy Tail 100 Years Quest [English Sub]
snippet.description: 《Fairy Tail》English Full Episode Playlist：https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl2VQRIahDF73hnkdPjNRYnu【Synopsis】Fiore Kingdom's most famous and rowdy wizard guild, Fairy Tail, is known for its trouble-making reputation. Natsu, Lucy, Happy, Gray, Erza, Wendy, and Carla are preparing to embark on a new journey. Their destination is the distant northern land of Guiltina, home to the world's oldest wizard guild, Magia Dragon.Having survived deadly battles against the Black Wizard Zeref and the Black Dragon Acnologia, Natsu and his friends have been granted special permission to take on the 100 Years Quest, a challenge even more advanced than an S-rank quest. This legendary quest has remained uncompleted for over a century since the founding of Magia Dragon.In this new adventure, they will encounter mysterious towns, enigmatic gods, and sinister enemies for the first time. The thrilling new adventure of the Fairy Tail guild is about to begin!【Staff】Original Work: Hiro Mashima & Atsuo UedaChief Director: Shinji IshihiraDirector: Toshinori WatanabeSeries Composition: Atsuhiro TomiokaCharacter Design: Yurika SakoSound Director: Shoji HataMusic: Yasuharu TakanashiAnimation Production: J.C.STAFF

snippet.title: A Journey Through Another World: Raising Kids While Adventuring [English Sub]
snippet.description: 【Synopsis】Due to a God's mistake, Takumi Kayano lost his life and was reincarnated. He received various skills and was sent to another world, where he found himself in the middle of a dangerous forest teeming with monsters.In that forest, Takumi found a boy and a girl who appeared to be twins. He named them Alan and Elena and took them into his custody. Despite being shocked at how easily the twins beat the monsters with their fighting skills, Takumi made it to town and to make a living he registered to the adventurer's guild.Now his life of leisurely living as an adventurer while looking after Alan and Elena growing up had just begun.【Staff】Original Story: Shizuru Minazuki (published by AlphaPolis)Original Illustration: YamakawaManga: Tomomi MizunaDirector: Atsushi NigorikawaSeries Composition: Jun MaekawaCharacter Design: Yuki NakanoDirector of Art: Satoru KuwaharaColor Design: Mika IwamiDirectors of Photography: Nozomi ShitaraSound Director: Hiroto MorishitaSound Effect: Yoko SakuraiSound Recording: Masato MutoSound Recording Assistant: Risako YamadaSound Studio: Three S StudioSound Production: Ai AddictionMusic: Akiya SuzukiEditing: Motoki Niimi (REAL-T)Production Studio: EMT SquaredProduction Cooperation: B-BirdProduced by: GencoOpening Theme: "Yururing Travel Days" by Tebasaki Sensation (Dreamusic)Ending Theme: "MAKUAKE" by Gohobi (Pony Canyon)

snippet.title: A Nobody's Way Up to an Exploration Hero [English Sub]
snippet.description: 【Synopsis】Kaito Takagi is a high schooler with very low stats, practically just a random mob. He is a common explorer who spends every single day diving into a dungeon that appears in Japan to hunt slimes. One day, a never-before-seen golden slime appears before him. Despite his confusion, he managed to defeat it, and what appears before him is a legendary, extremely rare item called a servant card. As he steeled his resolve and used it to summon, a valkyrie with a beauty beyond this world appears.【Staff】Original creator: KaitoOriginal Character Design: ArumikkuDirector: Tomoki KobayashiSeries Composition: Kazuyuki FudeyasuCharacter Design: Shōko YasudaMusic: Keiji InaiAnimation Production: GekkoProduction: Starry Cube

snippet.title: Failure Frame: I Became the Strongest and Annihilated Everything with Low-Level Spells [English Sub]
snippet.description: 【Synopsis】At school, the aloof high school student, Touka Mimori, is summoned to another world as a hero along with his classmates. While the goddess Vysis identifies his classmates one after another with S-rank and A-rank abilities, Touka is declared to be the lowest rank, E-rank, and marked for "disposal." Abandoned in ruins with a zero survival rate, Touka, dismissed as a failure, attempts to escape using his "abnormal status skills." From that day on, harboring flames of revenge against the goddess Vysis, Touka abandons his harmless human persona and reveals the true nature hidden deep within his heart... "Shall we begin the struggle for survival?"【Staff】Original Story : Kaoru Shinozaki (Overlap Bunko)Original character design : KWKMDirector : Michio FukudaSeries Composition : Yasuhiro NakanishiCharacter Design / Chief Animation Director：Kana HashidateLO Supervisor：Kenji MasudaCreature Design: Yasuhiro Moriki, Koichi UsamiProp Design: Goichi Iwahata, Noritaka SuzukiWorld Setting: Sei EdamatsuColor Design: Munehiro FukuraDirector of Photography: Shintaro NakamuraArt Director: Akihiro HirasawaArt Director: Yoko Nakao3DCG Director: Kotaro SasakiSound Director: Nobuyuki AbeSound Production: Dax ProductionMusic: Tatsuhiko SaikiMusic Production: NichionAnimation Production: Seven ArcsAnimation Production Cooperation: SynergySP

snippet.title: I PARRY EVERYTHING [English Sub]
snippet.description: 【Synopsis】After traveling the world, battling monsters, and protecting the innocent, aspiring adventurer Noor faced a bitter truth: he possessed zero talent for adventuring. Nevertheless, young Noor pressed on with unyielding determination. He devoted a decade to refining the weakest skill, [Parry], mastering it to the point of deflecting a thousand swords. And yet he realized that his efforts were futile—he could never become an adventurer with only low-level skills, resigning himself to doing odd jobs in town. Little did he know, he was already among the world's strongest. One fateful day, Noor's destiny takes an unforeseen twist when he inadvertently rescues Princess Lynne from a monster attack. ──This is the story of how an invincible yet humble man, oblivious to his own strength, masters the weakest skill [Parry] and uses it to defeat powerful foes.【Staff】Original Creator: Nabeshiki (Earth Star Novel, published by Earth Star Entertainment)Original Illustrator: KawaguchiManga: KRSGDirector: Dai FukuyamaSeries Composition: Shigeru MurakoshiCharacter Design: Chikako NomaSub-character Design: Toshiaki OhashiProp Design: Haruna HashimotoMonster Design: Hiroyasu Oda (Studio Mogana)Main Animator: Satoshi HorisawaArt Director/Art Setting: Mikihiro HarabeColor Design: Nanako OkazakiDirector of Photography: Shingo Fukuyo (J.C.STAFF)Editor: Go TsuyoshiSound Director: Ryo TanakaMusic: Tatsuhiko Saiki, BeauDamianAnimation Production: OLM

snippet.title: The Ossan Newbie Adventurer, Trained to Death by the Most Powerful Party, Became Invincible [English Sub]
snippet.description:
【Synopsis】
"If you want to chase after your dream, then you better do it while you're still young." Everybody thinks that way. But sometimes, some adults will never give up. In a world where it's common for someone to become an adventurer in their teen, Rick Gladiatol, a former guild receptionist who is 30 years old, aims to become an adventurer.
After going through unimaginable training by the members of the continent's strongest party, the Orichalcum Fist, he tries to become an F-rank adventurer while having the capabilities of an S-rank adventurer.

【Staff】
Original creator: Kiraku Kishima
Original character design: Tea
Manga creator: Ken Ogino
Director: Shin Katagai
Series composition: Kasumi Tsuchida
Character design: Mari Eguchi
Music: Tomotaka Ohsumi
Sound director: Toshiki Kameyama
Animation production: Yumeta Company

snippet.title: 📌Limited-time only📌 Black Butler [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Great Britain, the Victorian Era, the latter half of the 19th century.
Sebastian is the butler for the aristocratic Phantomhive household.
He is intelligent, refined, dignified, and specialized in cooking and martial arts-- a perfect servant in all respects.
Dressed to the nines in a jet black tailcoat, Sebastian magnificently performs his duties, effortlessly dealing with his selfish 12-year-old master, Ciel.
Now, sit back and enjoy this exquisite butler anime...

snippet.title: WIND BREAKER [English Sub] (For audiences in {Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand})
snippet.description:
Anyone who causes pain, who brings destruction, who holds evil in their heart will be purged by Bofurin without exception!

Where the average scores are the lowest, but the fights are the strongest. Furin High School is renowned as a super school of delinquents. 
Haruka Sakura, a first-year student, came from outside the city to fight to the top.  
However, Furin High School has become a group that protects the town called the “Chime of the Wind Breaker” – Bofurin.

The heroic legend of high school delinquent Sakura begins here!

snippet.title: Date A Live V [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Spirits have the appearance of human girls, but they are different from humans.
They are even called the nemeses of mankind because of their powerful ability to cause disasters dubbed "spatial quakes" when they emerge from another dimension.
The only means that mankind has of dealing with the threat of these Spirits is to exterminate them by military force, or...

Date them and make them succumb to the power of love!

Shido Itsuka has the ability to seal the power of a Spirit by making her fall for him and kissing her.
He has been saving mankind and Spirits with his power, but a great upheaval is about to happen to him.
DEM Industry, one of the world's largest corporations specializing in Realizer, is after the power of the Spirits and attacks with all its might to take away Shido's life.
Then, a mysterious girl from the depths of Shido's memory reveals herself.
The biggest battle in the history, with so many agendas intertwined, shall begin.

.

Rimuru had officially become a Demon Lord after defeating Clayman. With the end of Walpurgis, Rimuru's territory now extended to the entirety of the Great Forest of Jura. With more residents at their hands as a result, Rimuru decided to hold a Founder's Festival to celebrate his becoming a Demon Lord and to greet all the representatives of other races coming to see him. Meanwhile, in the Holy Empire of Lubelius, the home ground of the anti-monster religion, Luminous Faith, Hinata, the Captain of the Crusaders, received a letter from Rimuru. However, it was a declaration of war that had been falsified by someone.

With Hinata reportedly heading to Tempest, what decision will Rimuru make?

Rimuru's new challenge in his pursuit of a prosperous, peaceful relationship between humans and monsters, where he must discern the true enemies and allies, begins.

snippet.title: Jellyfish Can't Swim in the Night [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"I" want to shine like a "somebody" too.

Trends dictate everything, from what people talk about tomorrow to what clothes they buy this week.
In this busy world, people don't have the leeway to even dream about being a "somebody."

Yoru Umitsuki, an illustrator on indefinite hiatus
Nonoka Tachibana, an ex-idol looking to prove herself through her songs
Nox Ryugasaki, a self-proclaimed strongest Vtuber
Kimura-chan, a mysterious composer who wants to support her idol

Four girls who stick out a bit from the rest of the world band together to form the anonymous artist "JELEE."

If it's JELEE and not themselves, they might have what it takes to shine.

snippet.title: THE NEW GATE [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The online game "The New Gate" was a virtual space crowded with many players, but one day it became something far more sinister, trapping the players inside the game and tormenting them.
Shin, the man known as the game's strongest player, stood up to the fight and defeated the game world's strongest enemy, Origin. After Origin's defeat, a resounding announcement says that the game has been cleared and all the trapped players will be released.
As players are logging out, Shin is about to do the same, but a new door suddenly opens. After being enveloped in light, the world Shin opens his eyes to turns out to be the world of The New Gate 500 years after the game was cleared.

snippet.title: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability [English Sub]
snippet.description:
What's important in sorcery are "Lineage", "Aptitude", and "Dedication".
A "mediocre" sorcerer who deeply loved sorcery yet was not blessed with lineage or aptitude had died a tragic death. On the verge of death, he wished he could have learned more sorcery and perfected it. He found himself reincarnated into Llyod, the 7th prince of the Kingdom of Saloum, who has a strong bloodline of sorcery.

Reborn with the perfect bloodline and aptitude, having his memories intact made what he could not achieve in his past life etched strongly within him, and he enjoys the unrivaled life of "mastering sorcery all he wants" using his excessive mana!

The manga serial based on the light novel released in the manga app "Magazine Pocket" from Kodansha has ranked number one in the sales ranking with more than 3 million copies printed! Now the most hyped "reincarnation fantasy" title is being adapted into anime!

The story takes place in a world inhabited by monsters and demons. In this story, the main character Llyod possesses mana so immense that anyone who is familliar with sorcery fears him. The story follows his growth as he studies sorcery as he pleases and strives to master it. Although a bit light-hearted, the story is packed with exhilarating and vigorous magical battles with overwhelming power!
Here begins the carefree reincarnation story of the 7th Prince!

snippet.title: Chillin' in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Banaza lives his life working as an ordinary merchant. One day, he gets summoned to the Magical Kingdom of Klyrode as a Hero Candidate. However, because his Level 1 abilities are the same as those of an average citizen, he is branded a failed hero and is unable to return home because of a mistake made by the kingdom.

Banaza is banished from the royal capital to the frontier. While trying to survive in the forest, he fights off slimes that attack him. Upon reaching Level 2, all his stats become the unfamiliar "∞" symbol.

This is the story of a man blessed with Transcendence who chose to change his name and appearance to live his life in a different world, a demon who fell in love with a member of the enemy race, and their tumultuous married life. They strive for a peaceful life as they rope in characters of all different races!

snippet.title: Re:Monster [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Killed by a stalker, when he wakes up he reincarnated as a goblin named Gobrou.

He evolves abnormally with his "Absorption" ability, which makes him stronger the more he devours, and in the blink of an eye he becomes the leader of the goblin community...

In a different world where the strong preying on the weak, Gobrou and his talented friends are surviving as underdogs!

A monster reincarnation fantasy has started!

snippet.title: IRODUKU: The World in Colors
snippet.description: In a world in the future where magic is still a part of everyday life, 17-year-old Hitomi Tsukishiro, a descendant of a family of mages, lost the ability to see colors when young and has grown up into a girl devoid of emotion. Concerned for her future, Hitomi’s grandmother Kohaku decides to send her back through time to the year 2018, where she discovers a world where vivid colors spring forth.

snippet.title: 【Limited Broadcast】Blue Exorcist [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Assiah, the realm of humans, and Gehenna, the realm of demons.
Normally, these two dimensions would never intersect, but having possessed all material substances, the demons are now intruding on the material world.
But among the human race, there are those who can confront such demons - the Exorcists.

snippet.title: Chained Soldier [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Mysterious gates suddenly appear all over Japan.
In another dimension beyond the gate called Mato, there are Peaches that only women can eat giving them unique abilities. They are fighting as a female-organized fighting group, the "Demon Defense Force", in order to exterminate the monster known as "Shuuki".

One day, Yuuki Wakura, a high school boy who is looking for a place to play a role, happens to wander into Mato and is attacked by Shuukis. Kyouka Uzen, the beautiful commander of the Demon Defense Force 7th Squad, rushes to his aid. Yuuki is transformed into a slave by Kyouka's ability, and then he successfully defeats Shuukis. He ends up fighting Shuukis as a slave and the caretaker of the Demon Defense Force.

A battle fantasy of "the boy who becomes a pet" starts here!

snippet.title: 7th Time Loop: The Villainess Enjoys a Carefree Life Married to Her Worst Enemy! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The duke's daughter, Rishe Irmgard Weitzner, has a secret.
That is, "if she lost her life at the age of 20, she would return to the moment of the annulment of her engagement five years ago."
She has enjoyed various lifestyles to her heart's content, such as being a merchant, an apothecary, a maid, and a knight.
But this is her 7th time, and she decides to live a long and happy life.

snippet.title: The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic [English Sub]
snippet.description: Ken Usato is an ordinary high school student. On his way home from school, he is swallowed up by a magic circle along with student council president Suzune Inukami and his classmate Kazuki Ryusen. The next thing they know, they find themselves in another world. The three of them were summoned as "heroes" to fight against the Demon Lord's army that's invading the kingdom. However, it turns out that only Suzune and Kazuki have what it takes to become heroes. Usato was just summoned by accident! The situation changes drastically when it is discovered that Usato has an aptitude for "healing magic." Rose, the leader of the Rescue Squad, appears and takes Usato away by force. What awaits Usato is a hellish training regimen beyond anything he could have ever imagined!

snippet.title: My Instant Death Ability is Overpowered [English Sub]
snippet.description:
It's the birth of the strongest protagonist who can kill all his enemies instantly!

During a school trip, Yogiri Takatou and his classmates were suddenly summoned to another world. The one who summoned them is a Sage named Sion. She gives them a special ability called "Gift", and unilaterally pronounces that they must complete the trials to become a Sage.

Even though they are all still shaken by the sudden situation, they begin to take action.

However, for some reason, some students cannot receive Gift, including Yogiri and Tomochika Dannoura. Those students without abilities are left as decoys when a dragon is approaching.

The remaining students are killed one after another by the dragon. yogiri and Tomochika are in danger!

...that was what we thought.

"Die."

Yogiri defeated the dragon with a single word. And what a surprise, he has an "Instant Death" ability, which allows him to instantly kill any target of his choice!

Yogiri and Tomochika begin a journey in order to get back to their original world. They meet various people from another world who have cheat-like abilities. An immortal vampire? A redo of a hero? A reincarnated person who is doted on by the gods? They are not a match against the Instant Death ability!

An adventure in another world of a downer boy with an unprecedented cheat ability as his weapon and a slightly clumsy pretty girl now begins!

snippet.title: Sasaki and Peeps [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A bird Sasaki bought from the pet shop was a reincarnated great renown sage from another world.

"My name is Piercarlo, an inhabitant of another world and a Starsage."

However, he's now a Java sparrow. Sasaki named his cute new pet "Peeps" and started living with him.

The sage then gave him the magic power to travel to another world. Every day returning from work, the two would enjoy a life in another world together! Eventually, the two start acting as merchants and selling the stuff from modern Japan to sell them in another world.

But then, one day, on his way back from work, Sasaki meets what's known as "Psychics." Sasaki survives the encounter using the magic power he got from Peeps. However, he gets mistaken as a psychic and is later scouted to join the national "Paranormal Phenomena Countermeasure Bureau."

Escape corporate slavery! Escape black company!
However, what he got was far from a stable public service job...

His meeting with a single Java sparrow greatly changed Sasaki's life! A story of another world fantasy x psychic battle set in both another world and modern Japan now begins!

snippet.title: Momokuri [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"I want to know everything about the person I love!" Yuki Kurihara, a second year high school student, falls in love with Shinya Momotsuki, who is a year younger than her. After she takes a hundred hidden camera pictures of him from a distance for her "Momo-kun Photo Collection", she decides to tell him she likes him. The two of them start to date, but Kurihara still continues to take hidden camera photos and collect the things he touches, and she's acting kind of weird. A romantic comedy about the love between two people who don't know how to express their feelings!
Is my love... weird?

snippet.title: Alderamin On the Sky [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The huge Katvana Empire is at war with the neighboring Kioka republic. In a corner of the empire, a young man is about be caught up in the flames of war. His name is Ikta Solork. He's lazy, a philanderer, and he hates war. He's about as far from a soldier as you can get.

On his way towards the next stage of officer's qualification exams, he and his childhood friend Yatorishino Igsem encounter the nurse trainee Harouma Beckle, Mashuu Tetrijirch, a member of the old military faction, and Torwey Lemion....

snippet.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated As A Slime: Visions of Coleus [English Sub]
snippet.description:
▶️ 《That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime》 
🔥 Full Series Playlist： 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl3_YNRvXA7O89pNP

Having saved the kids in the Kingdom of Engrassia, Rimuru's days as their teacher are coming to an end. One day, Yuuki, the Guildmaster of the Free Guild, comes up to Rimuru with a request. The request is to look up inside information about the conflict for the succession of the throne in the Kingdom of Coleus, a nation right in between the Kingdom of Engrassia and the Holy Empire of Lubelius. Rimuru began his undercover mission in the Kingdom of Coleus under the name of "Satoru." However, the situation turned out not to be a mere conflict for the succession of the throne, but a chaotic one where the demons and vampires are involved!

snippet.title: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, REALLY Love You [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Rentaro Aijo, who experienced 100 heartbreaks in middle school, visited a shrine and prayed to finally have a girlfriend in high school, but the God of Love appeared and told him "You will meet 100 destined soulmates during your high school years".
But, according to the God, those who meet their soulmates must fall in love and be happy together, or else they will die...
Encounters with these soulmates unfold one after another.
What will you do, Rentaro? What will happen to the 100 girls?

snippet.title: Shangri-La Frontier [English Sub]
snippet.description:
What makes you game?

For every 100 amazing games, there are a thousand that are pure crap.
This is the story of Rakuro Hizutome, a man who loves, and is loved by, crappy video games,
and his journey in the world of Shangri-La Frontier, one of the greatest video games of all time.

The original web novel has over 500 million pageviews,
and is unique in that a manga adaptation was begun before the web novel story was released in print.
It also has the honor of being the first manga in Shonen Magazine’s sixty-plus years of history to win the quadruple reader survey crown!

Shangri-La Frontier takes gaming experiences that everyone can relate to and uses them to create an entirely new type of fantasy story.
It’s a story that will bring new adventure and excitement to both adults who can relive their old memories, and young people at the forefront of technology.

The ultimate “Game x Fantasy” story,
about a “crappy game hunter” who challenges one of the greatest games ever made!

snippet.title: Tearmoon Empire [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"My neck... It's here!? I... Became younger?!"
In a grand kingdom, Tearmoon Empire, Mia, a 20-year-old princess known as the "Selfish Princess", was executed by a guillotine when her people revolted.
That's how it was supposed to but when she woke up, she time leaped to her 12-year-old self!
It seems like this is a restarted world...
Under her pillow, there was a bloody diary that she wrote even moments before she got executed.
For the future of the Empire?
To save the people from famine?
For the sake of numerous soldiers who lost their lives in civil war?
That's not it! Everything is to avoid the route that leads to the guillotine!
"If it's only this much, it'll be a cinch when I put my back into it!"

The cowardly, self-preserving, super selfish, and useless princess, struggles hard for her own sake.
The movements made by the selfish princess bring miracles, and the fantasy story of changing history begins.

snippet.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End [English Sub]
snippet.description:
After ten long years of adventuring, the mage Frieren alongside the hero Himmel and his party members has defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the world.

As an elf that can live for more than a thousand years, Frieren went to travel alone, with a promise that she would reunite with Himmel and the others later on.

50 years later, Frieren visited Himmel. However, in contrast to her being no different from how she was 50 years ago, Himmel has aged a lot and doesn’t have long to live.

A short time later, after seeing Himmel passes away before her own eyes, she finally realizes that she has never made any effort to “understand people.”

With that regret, Frieren heads on a journey to “understand people.”
On her journey, she will meet with all kinds of people and deal with all kinds of things.

snippet.description: A high school girl who is not good at communicating with people, Umika Konohoshi, meets a self-proclaimed alien, Yuu Akeuchi. They promise each other that they'll go to outer space together. She also meets the vice-class president, Haruno Takaragi, and the truant Matataki Raimon. They decide to build a rocket… This is a "youth rocket" story in which high school girls build rockets and aim for space!

snippet.title: Goblin Slayer II [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"I don't save the world. I only kill goblins."
 
In a guild near the borders, it is said that there is a peculiar man who rose to Silver rank (Rank 3) solely by hunting goblins.
 
A priestess had just become an adventurer and joined her first party, but she immediately find herself in danger, and the one who saved her from that was none other than that man, the Goblin Slayer.

snippet.title: SHY [English Sub]
snippet.description:
In the middle of the 21st century, war has disappeared from the earth――
 
The world has changed greatly thanks to the sudden appearance of peace-seeking "Heroes" with their superpower abilities from across the globe.
 
In this world where heroes from all nations fight to maintain the newly obtained era of peace, the heroine in charge of Japan's peace was none other than an extremely shy heroine, "Shy."

snippet.title: Girlfriend, Girlfriend Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Following their trip to the hot springs, Naoya decides to continue his two-timing relationship with Saki and Nagisa, and will treat them fairly.

Add to the mix, Mirika who kissed him first, and Shino who has a secret crush on Naoya. The stage is set for the five lovebirds as summer vacation arrives. Fireworks, camping, and then to Okinawa...

Mirika's younger sister, Risa, also makes an appearance. The neo-standard love comedy gets more and more exciting! 
The sparks of love scatter and the swimsuit in the summer season 2 begins!

snippet.title: Our Dating Story: The Experienced You and The Inexperienced Me [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Ryuto Kashima is a gloomy, boring boy who, of course, never had a girlfriend for 16 years. Meanwhile, his heroine, Luna Shirakawa, is the most beautiful gal in his grade with plenty of romantic experience.

He thought it was enough for him just to admire her from afar, but to his surprise, they ended up going out together!

Thus began the love story about a boy with practically zero romantic experience and a gal with tons of it!

snippet.title: The Saintʼs Magic Power is Omnipotent Season2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
One day, Sei, an office lady in her twenties is summoned to another world as its "Saint".
Using her love for plants, she started working at the medicinal flora research institute, but thanks to her workaholic nature and her "Saint power", she kept making potions that were 50% more potent one after another. 
On top of that, during a monster extermination trip, she invoked a purification magic of tremendous power, and Sei's reputation saw a titanic rise! 
After being officially recognized as the "Saint", people started admiring her as the savior of the Salutania Kingdom.
She is watched over and supported by Johan and Jude from the research institute, Yuri the Grand Magus, and Albert the Winter Knight, who is attracted to each other with Sei, but is still less than a lover. 
Even after becoming the most important person in the kingdom, Sei still immerses herself in research. However, her relationship with Albert grows deeper, and her love life could take a new turn?!

snippet.title: A Playthrough of a Certain Dude's VRMMO Life [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Daichi Tanaka, an office worker who loves games, dives into the world of the new VRMMO "One More Free Life Online", which boasts a high degree of freedom, under the username Earth.
He chooses to go on an adventure and hunt monsters at a relaxing pace while mastering skills that are labeled useless by other players.
He also makes potions that take a lot of time, develops delicious dishes that take so much effort, and sometimes enjoys hunting monsters with his own crafted crazy weapons.

snippet.title: Ragna Crimson [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A job to wield a sword, kill dragons, and be rewarded for it, the "dragon hunters".
Ragna is an amateur dragon hunter. Together with Leonica, a child prodigy who boasts a shocking number of dragon hunts, he challenges himself to dragon hunts day by day.
Ragna has only one wish: "I don't even have to be strong, I just want to stay by Leo's side forever."
An assault from the most evil strongest dragon ripped his fleeting wish to shreds.
The one he challenges is the absolute strongest of them all. The one he defies is the inescapable fate. Beyond the limit, there it lies...
The extreme super austere parallel universe battle!

snippet.title: Berserk of Gluttony [English Sub]
snippet.description: In a world where skill is absolute, Fate, a boy despised for his incompetence, is forced to live at the bottom of the pile. This is because Fate's skill, "Gluttony," is completely useless, as it only makes him hungry. The Vlerick family, one of the highest-ranking families of holy knights in the world, picked him up, and he was subjected to violence and forced to do chores every day. The only relief is Roxy Hart who treats Fate without looking down on him, even though she is a holy knight. However, his world changes forever when he and Roxy accidentally kill a bandit that has entered the castle. The moment he took the enemy's life, his Gluttony skill was triggered and his opponent's power flowed into him. Fate's skill, "Gluttony," is an extraordinary skill that allows him to take away the skills and abilities of the person he kills. Fate has gained the power to fight, then meets Greed, a sword with an ego that also bears the name of a deadly sin and steps further into the world of conflict. In order to protect his loved ones and fight against the unreasonable world, Fate devours the enemies that stand in his way. The destiny of the boy who once simply grovelled on the ground begins to change rapidly.

snippet.title: The Most Heretical Last Boss Queen: From Villainess to Savior [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"If I ever become a woeful queen, then please finish me."
Eight-year-old Princess Pride Royal Ivy realizes that she was a girl of an ordinary Japanese family from nowhere in her previous life. She's now reincarnated as the villainous queen of an otome game, "Our Ray of Light". She becomes Pride, the worst queen who torments her country and her people according to the game's story, the game's last boss. When she realizes that, she wants to avoid tragedies by relying only on her memories of the game. To avoid the tragedy that will happen in the future and to create a world where all the characters can be happy, she does her best for her country and her people while avoiding to become the last boss.

snippet.title: The Gene of AI [English Sub]
snippet.description:
This is the story of our future.
The overwhelming progress of AI that began in the 21st century has contributed to the development of society but has also confronted humanity with the pros and cons of using highly intelligent machines as tools.
And then, in the second half of the 22nd century, people accepted "humanoids" with human rights as a matter of course and lived together with them, distinct from "industrial AI."
As a new medical doctor who cures humanoids, Hikaru Sudo faces the "new diseases" brought about by the coexistence of humans and AI.
Sometimes, he uses the other side of him...

snippet.title: Dark Gathering [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Keitaro Gentoga has a strong spiritual sense and was once attacked by a spirit in an incident involving his childhood friend. Ever since, he became a shut-in.
To take a step to come back into society, Keitaro began working as a private tutor, and she met Yayoi Hozuki, the mysterious girl with unique eyes.
Her mother's spirit was taken away by an evil spirit, and she frequents haunted spots to look for clues. Even though Yayoi has a strong spirit sense, spirits avoid her, and therefore she needs Keitaro to lure them in.
Meanwhile, Keitaro decides to look for a power to undo the curse that has befallen himself and his childhood friend, leading to his cooperation with Yayoi.
And thus begin this new and crazy occult horror story.

snippet.title: Zom100: Bucket List of the Dead [English Sub]
snippet.description:
With three years under his belt at the company from hell, Akira Tendo is mentally and physically spent.
All at the ripe old age of twenty-four. Even his crush from Accounting, Saori, wants nothing to do with him.
Then, just when life is beginning to look like one big disappointment, it happens.
The zombie apocalypse descends on Japan!
Surrounded by hordes of hungry zombies, Akira comes to a realization that will forever change his life...

“Wait, does this mean I never have to go to work again?”

Confess to... party like it’s... travel Japan coast to...

Now, with his nightmare job no longer, Akira’s got his mojo back. Let the bucket listing begin!!

snippet.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A 34-year-old man, jobless, shut-in and NEET.
On a certain day, after he got kicked out of the house, met his death in a traffic incident... or so the man thought.

The instant he thought that, suddenly he was reincarnated as "Rudeus" in a world of swords and magic. With the piled regret and experience from his previous life, he swears to live his life earnestly this time around.

Meeting with various peoples, various magic training... the now developed Rudeus is setting on a really harsh and cruel journey, such as Teleportation Incident involving his hometown, Fittoa Region, and other various tales.

After prevailing many hardships and successfully coming home, Rudeus became one with her beloved Eris.  However, the very next morning, Rudeus suffered a heavy shock after realising the sudden disappearance of Eris. He had given up on everything and reverted to his shut-in and NEET self, just like the previous world. Alas, as the only lost person in his family caused by Teleportation Incident, his mother, Zenith has not been found yet. Now he is determined to find Zenith, and Rudeus is standing up on his legs once more.

snippet.title: My Unique Skill Makes Me OP even at Level 1 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The long-awaited Anime adaptation of the famous title that won 1st place in Shosetsuka ni Naro's daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly ranking!
Ryota Sato, a salaryman who worked at a black company, one day found himself inside an unfamiliar dungeon! Turned out, he's now in a world where every single thing is monster drops.
With the help of the girl he met there, Emily, he checked his own status, only to learn that his stats are all "F" (weakest)! Not only that, his level is fixed at 1!
However, he later learns that he actually possesses an OP Unique Skill; "Drop Skill: ALL S"!!! With this, can Ryota survive living in this strange new world?!
The adventure of the strongest of the weak will now begin!

localized.title: My Unique Skill Makes Me OP even at Level 1 [English Sub]
localized.description:
The long-awaited Anime adaptation of the famous title that won 1st place in Shosetsuka ni Naro's daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly ranking!
Ryota Sato, a salaryman who worked at a black company, one day found himself inside an unfamiliar dungeon! Turned out, he's now in a world where every single thing is monster drops.
With the help of the girl he met there, Emily, he checked his own status, only to learn that his stats are all "F" (weakest)! Not only that, his level is fixed at 1!
However, he later learns that he actually possesses an OP Unique Skill; "Drop Skill: ALL S"!!! With this, can Ryota survive living in this strange new world?!
The adventure of the strongest of the weak will now begin!

snippet.title: The Great Cleric: White-Collar Survival in Another World [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A former salaryman becomes undefeated in another world?!
A salaryman who was just a few steps away from getting his promotion got shot to his death.
For whatever reason, God decided to reincarnate the man as a 10-year-old Healer, Luciel, in another world.
Not only that, in this country he was born in, people seem to hate the Healers.
In fear for his safety, Luciel goes to the Adventurer Guild to earn the means to protect himself.
However, the training there was much more severe than he had imagined. On top of that, he had to drink a mysterious drink called "Substance X" every day.
Wait, how does this have anything to do with being a Healer?
The daily life survival of a masochistic zombie-like Healer now begins!

snippet.title: BanG Dream! It's MyGO!!!!! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"Would you play in a band for your whole life?"

Late spring of the first year of high school.
Everyone at Haneoka Girls' High School is in a band. Anon, who enrolled in school late, rushes to find band members so she can fit in with her classmates as soon as possible. While at it, she learned that Tomori, the "Haneoka's Weirdo Girl", has not yet formed a band. And then, Anon calls on her...

The scream of our music may be covered in scars and ill-formed.
Even if we get lost, just move forward.

snippet.title: Insomniacs after school [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"With Magari around, I feel like going to school now. I wonder what kind of relationship this is?"

A high school student, Ganta Nakami, who suffers from insomnia, meets Isaki Magari, who also suffers from insomnia, in an astronomical observatory, which is used as a storeroom now, when he's trying to skip helping out to prepare for the school's cultural festival. Thus, the two end up sharing a secret place...?

"Surely your sleepless nights must have some meanings to them..."

snippet.title: [Film] ARIA The AVVENIRE [English Sub]
snippet.description: Now that Akari Mizunashi is a Prima Undine and head of the Aria Company with her own apprentice, Ai Aino, she can't help but reminisce about her time as a Single. She has new responsibilities and much less time on her hands, but these changes bring with them new forms of miracles that Neo Venezia can give. Growing up into new roles is hard, but Akari can always count on the friends she's made on Aqua in times of need.

snippet.title: HUNTER×HUNTER [English Sub]
snippet.description: Gon, a young boy who lives on Whale Island, dreams of becoming a Hunter like his father, who left when Gon was still young.

snippet.title: Rokudo's Bad Girls [English Sub]
snippet.description:
All heroines in this story are "bad girls"!
The bullied boy is only popular with the "bad girls!"!
This is the love panic of the non-stop violent "bad girls"!

Tosuke Rokudo wished for a peaceful school life despite being bullied constantly at Amori Highschool that is full of delinquents. One day, a mysterious package from his supposedly dead grandfather came, then Rokudo received a strange power: the outrageous power of "unconditionally being super popular with 'bad girls' "!!

One after another, from female gangster to fashionistas and gang leaders, these bad girls with strong characters somehow showed their girly obedient and meek sides in front of Rokudo!

At first, Rokudo was perplexed, but as he got caught up in various fights and troubles caused by these bad girls, despite being timid, his hidden passionate and masculine sides started to bloom!

Although this was far from the ideal peaceful school life, being surrounded by the bad girls and his friends, his miserable days had started to take a turn, and here it begins, the odd school battle love panic!

snippet.title: (S2) BOFURI: I Don't Want to Get Hurt, so I'll Max Out My Defense. Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Maple is obsessed with the VRMMO game "NewWorld Online".

She assigned all her points to defense, and at the beginning of the game, it seemed that she would have to spend a lot of time to get good. However, she has acquired several vicious skills; what unfolded was she trampling down the enemies again and again!

Her extraordinary gaming style led to her becoming a famous player who is treated as the "Last Boss".

The guild [Maple Tree], which she set up with her best friend Sally, also gathered a group of unique and reliable friends, and their unity was further strengthened.

And then…

A new floor has been updated in "NewWorld Online"!
She joins forces with former rivals, makes new friends, and even holds new events?!
Here, too, Maple and her friends are sure to go on the rampage…?

The world is expanding and the adventures are getting more and more fun!

snippet.title: Sugar Apple Fairy Tale [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A girl and fairy guided by the sugar apples.
A glimmery fairy tale spun upon their dreams and love.

This is a world where humans use fairies and where candy is believed to bring about good fortune. There, a special candy crafter that crafts the venerated candy is called "Silver Sugar Master."

Anne, a girl whose late mother was a revered Silver Sugar Master, decides to inherit the craft and become Silver Sugar Master herself. To do that, she should prove her crafting skill at the royal capital's Royal Candy Fair. On the way to the royal capital city, she employed a warrior fairy named Challe as her bodyguard. Although Challe's ability as a warrior is true, he has a foul mouth and distrusts humans, thus, clashes with Anne are inevitable. However, as she continues her journey with Challe, Anne starts to desire friendship. Overcoming the differences in species and social standing as well as complicated circumstances, what kind of future will the human Anne and fairy Challe come to?

snippet.title: NEW GAME! (S1) [English Sub]
snippet.description: After graduating from high school, Suzukaze Aoba is accepted to a job at "Eagle Jump", the game company that developed "Fairies Story", a game she was obsessed with. On her first day as a new employee, Aoba arrives at work at "Eagle Jump" on a crowded morning train. She hesitates when she is already in the front of the building, wondering whether she should just walk in, unable to take the first step. Then, Toyama Rin approached, one of her senior employees who has just arrived at work, and Aoba is safely guided inside "Eagle Jump".

snippet.title: The Magical Revolution of the Reincarnated Princess and the Genius Young Lady [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Princess of the Kingdom of Pallettia, Anisphia "Anis" Wynn Pallettia, has memories of her previous life.
Reincarnated in a world where magic is commonplace, she dreams of becoming a wizard,
and aspires to be able to fly with magic, a crazy and insane thing to do.

But for some reason, Anisphia can't use magic.
She is nicknamed "Princess Odd" and spends her days and nights doing dubious research.

One night, Anisphia takes to the skies on her homemade witch broom. 
However, the uncontrollable broom jumps into a night party at the academy for nobles.

There, Euphyllia, the perfect duchess, rumored to be a magical genius,
is about to have her engagement annulled by Prince Algard, Anisphia's brother.
Seeing Euphyllia's tears shed silently, Anisphia gently reaches out to her.

snippet.title: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Mukoda Tsuyoshi, an average salaryman, is one day transported to another world out of the blue. 
Upon arrival in this world, he gains the peculiar yet seemingly useless skill of "Online Grocery."
Mukoda is discouraged at first, but the modern food he manages to bring to this new world using his skill proves to have some unbelievable effects!

snippet.title: Ningen Fushin: Adventurers Who Don't Believe in Humanity Will Save the World [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Terrane, a city belonging to the Holy Kingdom of Dinese. Many kinds of people gather in this city. Adventurers wanting to get rich, merchants with a keen eye, minstrels who sing and dance, aristocrats, priests, and beastmen... A melting pot of many professions and races, along with its maze-like structure earned the city the nickname of "Labyrinth City."
Nick, a light combatant that was kicked out of his party, the "Countless Art of Battle" and tricked by his girlfriend, is also a resident of this city.
Tired of it all, he went by a local bar. The bad foods, the cheerful adventurers around him, the silent people he's sharing a table with, the lukewarm beers... Fed up, he shouts, unknowingly followed by his tablemates.
"There's no way I can trust humans!!"
His frustration slipped through his mouth, but his tablemates shouted the same thing at the exact same time to his surprise.
These four people, each carrying their own wounds to lick, are about to start on a new adventure.

snippet.title: UniteUp! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A multi-dimensional idol project from Sony Music, "UniteUp!"
On a suddenly opened Youtube channel, various music from many different artists was posted.
KIKUNOYOU, EVAN, and Susu with their cover of popular songs.
Daiki Takao, Eishiro Nijo, and Fuga Togo who release high-level musicality songs as solo artists.
Haruka performs songs he wrote by himself, accompanied by his unique voice.
Anela, a top idol that delivers high-quality performances with an overwhelming presence.
The music, and feelings that connect them together, bring them into a development of a new drama.

snippet.title: Reborn to Master the Blade: From Hero-King to Extraordinary Squire ♀ [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The Hero-King wished to be free and reincarnated as the strongest, beautiful, peerless knight!
Strongest gender change reincarnation fantasy!

Hero King Inglis became a "divine knight" with the blessing of a goddess, and established a vast kingdom. Eventually, just before he died in his old age, he strongly wished, "In a lifetime of serving my country and my people, I couldn't master my skills. In my next life, I want to live for myself and train to my limits."
His wish was heard by the goddess, and he's reincarnated into the far future.

However, that Hero King's born as the "daughter" of a famous knight family!? And for some reason, she is labeled as an unqualified knight.

"If anything, it's convenient for me. I can stay on the front line without getting promoted. There's no better training than actual combat!"

She aims to enroll in the Knights' Academy to train as a squire for her childhood friend, Rafinha.
The legend of the world's strongest beautiful squire begins!

snippet.title: Woodpecker Detective’s Office [English Sub]
snippet.description:
It is the end of the Meiji Era.
The genius poet Ishikawa Takuboku, who’s struggling financially, starts a detective business out of his lodging in response to a certain murder case.
He calls it the Woodpecker Detective’s Office. "The ghosts of the Twelve-Story Tower in Asakusa," "the man-eating figure who wanders the streets on snowy nights"...
Takuboku involves himself in one bizarre case after another with his hometown acquaintance, Kindaichi Kyosuke, as his assistant.

snippet.title: My Senpai is Annoying [English Sub]
snippet.description:
It is Igarashi Futaba's second year at Itomaki Corporation, and she really wants to be a respected employee as soon as possible!
She is watched over by her senpai, Takeda Harumi, who although is quite the crass guy, is also very caring towards her.
Even though Futaba finds Takeda-senpai annoying, actually there are times where he's not that bad… But he really is annoying!
Based on the hotly popular web-comic that broke the record for the highest number of likes on Twitter in 2017 (1 chapter = 415,000 likes), and won first place in the Web Manga category in the Up-and-coming Manga Awards 2018 - My Senpai is Annoying!
The long-awaited anime adaptation of this everyday romantic comedy about struggling working adults is coming soon!

snippet.title: Girls' Last Tour [English Sub]
snippet.description: "Get along with despair." The civilization where humans prosper and thrive has collapsed for a long time. Every living being live constantly with death, it's a world where everything is already over. All that remains is a giant city that has turned into ruin and machines that have rotted away with time. When did the world end, and why did the world end? In the last moments of the world, where those things aren't even questioned anymore, two girls are on their own, Chito, and Yuuri. Riding on their favorite Kettenkrad, they roam around the endless ruins, without any destination. In a world where everything is heading towards its end, the apocalypse fantasy tour story of the girls will start now.

snippet.title: Ahiru no Sora [English Sub]
snippet.description: Sora Kurumatani is short, which is definitely not an advantage in basketball. Sora, who was never selected as starting member of a basketball team because of his height, enters Kuzuryū High School, also known as Kuzu High, with high hopes for the high school’s basketball team. However, the basketball team was almost not functioning. It was not an environment in which he could play basketball. However, Sora's passion for basketball makes him grow together with members of Kuzu High basketball team, despite having conflicts with them. What will the members of the Kuzu High basketball team do as they face one difficulty after another…?!

snippet.title: Accel World [English Sub]
snippet.description: Set in the year 2046, Neuro-Synchronization allows humans to virtually manipulate their five senses, where people can access the internet and enter virtual worlds via Neuro-Linkers. The series follows Haruyuki "Haru" Arita, a short, fat boy who has low self-esteem due to being bullied at school which Haru vents his frustrations in virtual world games. Haruyuki soon gets the attention of Kuroyukihime, the Student Council Vice-President who invites him into the "Accelerated World" called Brain Burst, a program that allows users to make time appear to stand still in their surroundings by "accelerating" their brainwaves in the real world. But in order to gain more points to accelerate, Brain Burst users fight each other in a virtual reality massive multiplayer online (VRMMO) fighting game where losing all of your points means you can never use Brain Burst again. Grateful for helping him, Haruyuki vows to help Kuroyukihime defeat the "Six Kings of Color", the leaders of the most powerful factions in Brain Burst and obtain Level 10 to ultimately learn why the "Accelerated World" was created.

snippet.title: Legend of Mana -The Teardrop Crystal- [English Sub]
snippet.description:
There was once a young boy named Shiloh who lives near the city of Domina. From who knows when, he starts to hear a mysterious voice inside his dream, telling him that he has a duty to fulfill.

One day, he meets a pair of "Jumi."

Jumi is a tribe of humanoid gem people that was driven to near-extinction due to people hunting the jewels embedded in their chests.

With the appearance of a mysterious "Jewel Hunter", more and more Jumi people are attacked all over the world.

Thus Shiloh embarks on a journey about the Jumi and their jewels!

With the appearance of a mysterious "Jewel Hunter", more and more Jumi people are attacked all over the world.

Thus Shiloh embarks on a journey about the Jumi and their jewels!

The psychic power is going to run wild powered by youth! The long-awaited third season is finally coming!

snippet.title: Welcome To Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 3 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Welcome to the fun-filled Netherworld!! 

Due to an unexpected sequence of events, Suzuki Iruma, a good-natured boy who can't say no to others, became the grandson of Sullivan, the great Demon of the Netherworld! And so, as he is doted on by the demon Sullivan, Iruma began to attend the demon school where Sullivan is the chair-demon... 

Hiding his identity as a human, Iruma only wishes to live a peaceful school life, but for one reason or another he always ended up being the center of attention. Getting into fights with elite demons, befriending an oddball(?) female demon, and furthermore, even being kept an eye on by the strict student council president! 

But with his natural kindness, Iruma overcomes these troubles one after another!

snippet.title: Kakuriyo -Bed & Breakfast for Spirits- [English Sub]
snippet.description: Aoi Tsubaki is suddenly swept away to the hidden realm when a handsome ogre lord comes to take her as his wife! He claims that she must pay back her grandfather’s debt, but Aoi’s not willing to give her hand over so easily. Instead, she makes a deal to work at the Tenjin-ya, a bed and breakfast for ayakashi, to pay back what her family owes.as she wins the spirits over one dish at a time, Aoi will find much more than a job in this hidden realm.

snippet.title: Golden Kamuy [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Late Meiji era. The Russo-Japanese war hero, Sugimoto Saichi, nicknamed "the Immortal Sugimoto", is in Hokkaido to acquire a large sum of money for a specific purpose. There, he is offered the chance to get rich from the huge reserves of gold stolen from the Ainu people. The reserves are hidden by a man imprisoned in Abashiri Prison, and the tattoos on the bodies of 24 escaped prisoners are said to be clues to its whereabouts.
Then, Sugimoto is attacked by a brown bear, and an Ainu girl saves him. The girl, whose name is Asirpa, had her father killed by the man who took the buried gold. As if in response to Sugimoto's actions, the 7th Division, the most powerful unit in the north, and escaped prisoners with tattoos on their backs, who have long been in the dark for the buried gold, also start to make their movements known. What will become of the get-rich-quick survival that has been taking place in the magnificent northern lands?

snippet.title: The DEVIL Is A Part-Timer! Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
In the parallel of Ente Isla, they were the Overlord and the Hero. But in modern-day Tokyo, they are hardworking employees of the modern world under new identities, Sadao Maou and Emi Yusa. 

Along with his two confidants at the Overlord's Castle, and a loving high school girl, Chiho, Maou is getting used to life in Japan, while also struggling with the rough economic times. One day, a mysterious little girl appears and the Overlord's Castle is in turmoil! 

The Overlord’s Castle is tasked with raising a child, while visitors from Ente Isla keep coming in. They also have to work to support the people living in the Overlord's Castle, which is a miserable six-mat room! And so the part-timer Overlord's folksy fantasy unfolds once again in the second season of the anime!

snippet.title: FUUTO PI [English Sub] | From 1st August 2022, every Monday at 00:00 (GMT+8)
snippet.description:
The wind never stopped blowing in that city.
 It carries everything. Even small joy, even grand misfortune.
 
 Such is the city of the wind, Fuuto.
 
 "Museum", the organisation that once threatened the city, has been brought to its destruction by the Kamen Riders. However, the very dangerous item that they have massively produced, the "Gaia Memories", are still scattered all over the place, secretly distributed within the emotionally turbulent Fuuto. There is no end to the people transformed by the memory into the monstrous"Dopant".
 
 Shotaro Hidari, a "half-boiled" private investigator held back by his kindness, and Philip, the genius private investigator and Shotaro's forever partner. Today in Narumi Detective Agency where the two work, comes a bizarre request.
 
 As the wind stops blowing, mysterious shadows have started moving within the city. As Shotaro meets the mysterious devilish beauty, Tokime, his fate starts to change.
 And thus a new case envelops Shotaro & Philip, the two in one detective, also known as Kamen Rider W.
 
 It has been 13 years since the TV show aired in 2009.
 The story of Kamen Rider W has moved from live-action to manga, and now to another new stage. The true sequel of the story, "Fuuto PI", finally moves into anime!

snippet.title: Parallel World Pharmacy [English Sub] | From 10th July 2022, every Sunday at 21:30 (GMT+8)
snippet.description: Kanji Yakutani is a pharmaceutical researcher in modern Japan. He woke up one day and found that he had been reborn as Falma de Médicis, a son of a court pharmacist from the respected de Médicis family. Falma was shocked upon seeing the world's medicinal field being dominated by false procedure and drug formulations as well as popular practices like magic and spell that could not be regarded as medical practice at all. Making use of the modern pharmaceutical knowledge that he has, along with the overpowering ability of "Substance Creation & Substance Elimination" which he gained in the parallel world as part of "Divine Arts" only the noble family can use, he faced various illnesses upon him. And so, he produced effective drugs known as "Parallel World Pharmacy" and spread them to the people. Parallel World power x modern pharmacy!  The fantasy that changes the future of the medical field in an alternate world and saves people, begins now!

snippet.title: Lucifer and Biscuit Hammer [English Sub] | From 9th July 2022, every Saturday at 02:25 (GMT+8)
snippet.description:
One day, an ordinary college student, Yuuhi Amamiya was asked to save the planet by a talking lizard. Before he even got the chance to refuse, he was chosen as a member of the Beast Knights, received the power of Domain Control through a mysterious ring, and was forced to fight for his life. 
 
 However, right when it all seems lost, Yuuhi was saved by the girl who lives next door, Samidare, who, much of his surprise, was also plotting to destroy the planet herself.
 
 As a result, Yuuhi, charmed by her overwhelming strength and charisma, became her servant and joined her on her quest to destroy the planet.

snippet.title: Classroom of the Elite Season 2 [English Sub] | From 4th July 2022, every Monday at 21:00 (GMT+8)
snippet.description:
Tokyo Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School.
The school boasts a 100% advancement rate and employment rate, and students receive points equivalent to 100,000 yen in cash every month.
It is a paradise-like school, but in reality, it is a school that judges its students based on merit, where only a few students with excellent grades receive favorable treatment.
Kiyotaka Ayanokoji is assigned to Class D, a class full of problem children, and he cooperates with his classmate Suzune Horikita, who is aiming for promotion to Class A.
After completing a survival test on a deserted island, the students enjoys a brief rest on a luxury cruise ship, but then a new special exam is about to begin, in which each class is involved. Will it be for the class, for the group, or for the individual?
While the other classes are showing disturbing behaviour, Class D, which lacks cohesion, finds itself in a tight spot.
Can the students, torn between trust and suspicion, see through the truth?
A new school apocalypse is about to unveil once again.
