snippet.title: Made in Abyss: The Golden City of the Scorching Sun [English Sub] | From 6th July 2022 at 22:30 (GMT+8)
snippet.description:
Every place in the world has been explored to every nook and cranny, with the sole exception being the great giant hole known as the Abyss. Nobody knows how deep the pit runs, and it is filled many weird creatures and valuable relics that cannot be recreated with current technology. The many mysteries of the Abyss draws upon many to start an adventure. After generations, those adventurers that have challenged the depth of the Abyss are now known as the Cave Raiders. Riko, the child that lives in an orphanagee at the city of Orth, has intertwined fate with the Abyss. She dreams of one day becoming a legendary cave raider like her mother and unveil the mystery of the Abyss. One day, the white whistle of her mother, Lyza, was discovered along with a message, driving Riko to explore the depth of the Abyss. Reg, a robot that lost his memories and was then found by Riko is also determined to accompany in her journey.
 
 At the 4th layer, Riko suffered from the venoms of an Orb Piercer, but she was rescued by Nanachi, a hollow. After Nanachi joined the group, they advanced into the 5th layer where Bondrewd, a White Whistle, awaits. There, they met Prushka, a girl raised by Bondrewd that doesn't know about life outside the Abyss. Prushka becomes engrossed after listening to Riko's tale of adventure and wishes to go with her, but unfortunately she was used by Bondrewd in an experiment. However, Prushka then becomes Riko's white whistle, and they all went into the 6th layer, The Capital of the Unreturned, where a village of Hollows living with their own unique sense of values lies.

snippet.title: Made in Abyss [English Sub] | S2 starting from 6th July 2022 at 22:30 (GMT+8)
snippet.description: In a world that has seen its every corner explored, the huge chasm called the "Abyss" stands as the last unknown frontier. Within this deep pit, the ultimate depth of which is still unknown, strange creatures live among valuable sleeping relics that today's human technology is unable to reproduce. The mysterious formation that is the Abyss mesmerizes people and urges them to venture inside. These adventurers, who continue to challenge the Abyss time and time again, have come to be known as "cave raiders." In the city of Orth, which has taken rise at the edge of the Abyss, lives an orphan named Riko. She dreams of someday becoming a legendary cave raider like her mother and of unraveling the mysteries of the Abyss. One day while Riko is cave raiding in the Abyss, she comes across a robot who looks like a human boy...

snippet.description:
A unique wing that travels around the world to bring some respite and mend the heart of those who fight against Neuroi and those who were chased away from their hometown.
The Allied Air Force Aviation Music Corps, Luminous Witches.
That is the identity of these girls.
An aviation corps that is the exact opposite of the Joint Fighter Wing Witches who fights to protect people, they don't fight, but they protect people's smile with music!

snippet.title: Yakitate!! Ja-Pan [English Sub]
snippet.description: Kazuma Azuma wants to make bread. Not just any kind of bread though. He wants to make a bread that represents Japan itself and can stand toe-to-toe with rice as a national food. Thanks to his legendary “Hands of the Sun,” unnaturally warm hands that allow dough to ferment faster, Kazuma's bread is like a slice of Heaven. And when the Pantasia Rookie Competition arrives, everyone will get a taste of his skill! Along with his friend Kawachi, he’ll go up against koala karate masters, Harvard bread scientists, samurai with rolling-pin swords and more as he bakes his way to glory!

snippet.title: A Certain Scientific Railgun S [English Sub]
snippet.description: With a total population of 2.3 million, the huge city occupies most of the western part of Tokyo. About 80% of its population are students, so the city is known as the 'Academy City', where the development of supernatural powers, which twist the laws of the world to create supernatural phenomena, takes place.Students who have undergone special classes (curriculum) and gained abilities are evaluated in six levels from 'no ability (level 0)' to 'super ability (level 5)' through periodic physical examinations (system scan). Standing at the top of the list, and being described as the strongest, are the seven 'Level 5 psychics'.One of them is Mikoto Misaka. She is a top-level "Electromaster" who can manipulate electricity at will, and is also known as "Railgun", a 14-year-old girl who attends the prestigious Tokiwadai Middle School for young ladies. Kuroko Shirai is a junior student and a member of the Judgment. Her colleague Shikari Hatsuharu, who yearns to be a lady, and her friend Ruiko Saten, who loves urban legends. With these friends, Mikoto is leading a peaceful, ordinary and slightly unusual everyday life in the academy city, when suddenly the "darkness" of the academy city closes in on her...

Students who have undergone special classes (curriculum) and gained abilities are evaluated in six levels from 'no ability (level 0)' to 'super ability (level 5)' through periodic physical examinations (system scan). Standing at the top of the list, and being described as the strongest, are the seven 'Level 5 psychics'.
One of them is Mikoto Misaka. She is a 14-year-old middle school student at the prestigious Tokiwadai Middle School for young ladies. She lives an everyday academy-city life with her juniors, Kuroko Shirai, a member of the 'Judgment', and others.
This story depicts the daily life of peaceful, ordinary and slightly unusual girls with abilities.

snippet.title: A Certain Magical Index [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The stage is set in A huge city occupying most of western Tokyo, Academy City, is called so because about 80% of the total population of 2,300,000 people are students, and the students who live there have a special curriculum to develop their psychic abilities, and are assessed on a six-levels scale depending on their abilities, ranging from Level 0 to Level 5.
Our main character, Toma Kamijo, is a high school student in Academy City, but is rated at Level 0, putting him on the verge of flunking out of school. In his right hand there is an ability called "Imagine Breaker" which cancels out "any other power."
On the first day of summer vacation, a sister in a pure white nun's habit suddenly fall from the sky in his room. She calls herself "Index" who has escaped from the world of magic, and sorcerers have rushed in pursuit of her. They want the 103,000 grimoires inside Index's head. In the battle Kamijo is forced to get involved in, and destroys the magic that has been cast on Index with his right hand, and in exchange for freeing her from her sad fate, he loses his memory.
Toma spends his days trying not to let anyone know that he has lost his memory, but one incident after another befalls him.
When science and magic cross paths, the story begins.

snippet.title: SPY×FAMILY	[English Sub]
snippet.description:
In an era in which the nations of the world were waging a fierce war of information, Ostania and Westalis had been in a cold war state for decades. 
Twilight is one of the best spies from Westalis and he has been charged with the top-secret mission to keep his eye on Desmond, a key figure from Ostania who is threatening the peace between the East and the West.

His mission is to "Establish a family and infiltrate the social circle at the prestigious school his target's son attends.

However, the daughter Twilight meets is a telepath who can read people's minds and his wife is an assassin! The peace of the world rests in the hands of a family of three hiding their true identities from each other.

snippet.title: Shikimori's Not Just a Cutie [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The best and coolest girlfriend is here! Izumi-kun, a high school boy who’s born with bad luck, has a girlfriend, Shikimori-san, who is his classmate. She has a beautiful smile, is kind, and always seems happy when she is with Izumi-kun. She's pretty, cute, and full of love, but when Izumi is in trouble… She turns into the coolest girlfriend ever!
The fun daily life of the cute and cool Shikimori-san, Izumi-kun and their good friends never stops!
The love comedy with 1000% preciousness is finally getting started!

snippet.title: The Dawn of the Witch [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Saybil is a student of the academy of magic, however, he has no memories of his life before entering the academy. 
His daily life at the academy is full of emptiness as he himself couldn't figure out why he was here in the first place. 
Without any motivation, his grade is always among the lowest. 
One day, the principal, Albus, suddenly sent Saybil to a dangerous special training.
"I want you to spread words of the usefulness of magic in a land where witch hunts exist."
It has been years after the end of the war between the witches and the church, 
but society hasn't fully accepted both witches and magic.
It is the dawn of the witch.
This is a self-discovery story of an ordinary boy and his friends with a hidden past.

snippet.title: Skeleton knight in another world  -  [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Arc awakes and finds that he has been thrown into another world in the form of the game character he used to play in MMORPG. His character was a "skeleton knight" that looked like a skeleton clad in full-body armour.

──If people find out, they will think he is a monster and try to kill him!

Arc decides to keep a low profile and spend his time as a mercenary. However, he was not the sort of man who could let evil run rampant in front of his eyes!

An isekai fantasy about a skeleton knight who "make a world a better place", selflessly, is here!

snippet.title: The Greatest Demon Lord Is Reborn as a Typical Nobody -  [ENG Sub]
snippet.description:
Valvatos, whose name was engraved in mythology, was the strongest Demon King in history.

Weary of his life as a King, he yearns for an ordinary life - an escape from the loneliness caused by his strength.
Thus, he reincarnated into a young man named Ard Meteor, born as a typical villager a thousand years later.

However, in this reincarnated future, magical civilization is in decline.
Magic itself was weakening.

It was in this era that Ard entered a Magic Academy with his first friend since childhood, Irina.
However, no matter how much he tried to reject being special, he couldn't hide his extraordinary powers.

Because of this, there was a ceaseless throng of people who were in awe of him, and who wants to get closer to him.
Moreover, the 'demons' who once terrorized the world had also begun to stir.

Can the former Demon King live a peaceful and mediocre life that he longed for?
A turbulent Heroic School-Fantasy has begun!

snippet.title: His and Her Circumstances [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Like a drug, Yukino Miyazawa was addicted to admiration and praise from those around her. She worked hard to become the perfect student, the perfect girl. But that was before... him. Souichirou Arima.

The instant she met him, she hated him. Without even trying, he snatched the very glory from her hands by easily acing the high school entrance exam that should have made her the class representative. To take back what is rightfully hers, Yukino is putting all her efforts into plotting her revenge - but was love part of the plan?

snippet.title: Ascendance of a Bookworm S3 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
To a world where anyone can read books!

Myne who became an apprentice to the blue shrine maiden of the temple, worked with Lutz, Tuuli, and the children of the orphanage to create a scripture picture book for children.
Myne's passion for books is only growing. Give Johan and Heidi the title of Gutenberg and aim for the next goal, letterpress printing.

However, a dark cloud rushes into Myne's path.
The aristocrats who found great value in Myne, who has great magical power and mysterious knowledge, and the aristocrats who have grudge against Myne, are secretly targeting her.

For her safety, Myne starts to have an escort knight.
In addition, Ferdinand orders Myne to be the adopted daughter of the aristocrat Karstedt.
That order was made to protect Myne, but she cannot accept Mine who does not want to leave her dear family.

Meanwhile, a new life is born in Myne's family.
Effa gives birth to Kamil, and Myne became an older sister.
And then, the temple decided to raise Dirk, an abandoned child who eats a lot. Delia, an apprentice attendant, loves Dirk so much as if he's a part of her own family.

As the number of things Myne want to protect increased, the evil hands aiming at Myne kept on approaching.
What will happen to Myne!?

snippet.title: The Familiar of Zero [English Sub]
snippet.description: In a world where magic is a reality, the young Louise is at the bottom of her class. Dubbed "Zero" by her classmates at Tristein Academy (due to her zero success rate for magic), Louise (along with all first year students) was charged with summoning a familiar; and instead of a cute magical creature, the familiar arrived in the form of... Saito Hiraga, a normal Japanese boy who was abruptly teleported from his own world?! Can both Louise and Saito come to terms with their new and complicated "relationship" and (more importantly) help Saito find a way home?

snippet.title: BLACK BULLET [English Sub]
snippet.description: Gastrea, grotesque-looking parasitic lifeforms suddenly appeared. With their red-sparkling eyes, overwhelming strength, and abnormal regeneration capabilities, humanity doesn't stand a chance against their invasion. Now that humanity had lost half of its territory, they live in a place surrounded by monoliths made from the only metal Gastrea are weak against, "Varanium." They have no other choice than to live in fear of Gastrea, hiding inside the small Area. In such a situation, the humanity that survived formed an organization, and it consists of specialists that have a way to fight Gastrea. They're called "Civil Security Agency," shortened as "Civil Officer." Amongst them, is Rentaro Satomi, a high school boy that's affiliated with Tendo Civil Security Agent. Along with his partner, Aihara Enju, he got involved in schemes that might bring destruction into Tokyo.

snippet.title: The King of Braves GaoGaiGar [English Sub]
snippet.description: In the year 2005, a race of alien monsters called Zondars emerge from underground and launch a series of attacks on the city of Tokyo. The only defense against these creatures is the secret agency known as the Gutsy Geoid Guard (or 3G) and their ultimate weapon, the awesome giant robot GaoGaiGar. GaoGaiGar's pilot, Guy Shishio, is a former astronaut who was nearly killed two years before when the Zondars first crashed to earth. Guy's life was spared when a mysterious robot lion called Galeon pulled him from the burning shuttle and brought him to Earth. Guy's father, Leo, then used Galeon's technology to rebuild his shattered son as a cyborg, in the hopes that he could stop the aliens when they appear. Now, with Galeon as its core, GaoGaiGar fights to protect Earth. He is aided by a team of transforming robots and by a young boy named Mamoru, who has the power to purify the Zondars' cores, and seems to be connected to the mysterious Galeon.

snippet.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
▶️ 《Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-》 
🔥 Full Series Playlist： 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl3RN7t6wesJqlUkSUN6FHKF
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
A reunion that was supposed to spell the arrival of peaceful times is quickly shattered when Subaru Natsuki and Emilia return to Irlam village. Witnessing the devastation left behind by the calamities known as Sin Archbishops, Subaru sinks into the depths of despair as his ability to redo proves futile.
As the group makes their way to the Sanctuary in search of answers, Subaru has an unexpected encounter with the Witch of Greed—Echidna. Subjected to her untamed rhythm, he is forced to dive into the spirals of the past and future. At the same time, several mysterious threats set their sights on the Sanctuary, heralding a horrific fate for the hapless people trapped within.
Everlasting contracts, past sins, and unrequited love will clash and submerge into a river of blood in the second season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu. Pushed to the brink of hopelessness, how long will Subaru's resolve to save his loved ones last?

snippet.title: Hakata Tonkotsu Ramens [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"There is a person you desperately want to kill. Now, how do you kill that person?" 
At a glance, Fukuoka seems like a peaceful town, but crime runs rampant behind the scenes. 
It's now a battleground for professional killers, with urban legends suggesting that there's even one who specializes in killing professional killers.
Assassins, detectives, revenge seekers, informants, torture specialists... 
When stories are told of these and other professionals of the underground, a "killer of professional killers" appears...

snippet.title: High School Prodigies Have It Easy Even in Another World! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
An aeroplane accident befalls seven high school students.
When they regain consciousness, it's in a world of magic and half-animal humans.
Thrown into a feudalistic society run by autocrats and guilds
with not a modern convenience in sight, these high schoolers don't even sweat it!

No electricity?
They build a nuclear power plant.

Need to make a little money?
They take over economic control of the city.

How to repay their gratitude to an oppressed citizenry?
They upend the corrupt nobility by going to war.

Not just any high schoolers, these teenagers are super prodigies, standing atop their fields of politics, economics, science, medicine, journalism, martial arts and prestidigitation! They are the world's Dream Team of intellectual, technological and physical prowess, starring in a delightful tale of virtue over vice in an otherworldly revolution!

snippet.title: The Genius Prince's Guide to Raising a Nation Out of Debt [English Sub]
snippet.description: Natra Kingdom, a kingdom that's being exposed to the threat of a hegemony kingdom. Wein, a prince who had to handle the burden of the country even though he's still young, used his brilliance, and starts to show great achievements with the support of his aide, Ninym. "But this country...Is a dead end!" He wants to meddle with internal affairs, but there's no money. There's not enough army to take money from somewhere else. People who are brilliant and decent, are moving to other countries. "I just want to sell this country quick, and flee" Wein's dream is to retire quickly, and live a quiet and comfortable life. If he flatters a big kingdom, and sell the kingdom to them, he should be able to achieve his dream. But, the diplomacy and military develops in a way that's outside of his predictions? Shake the world with wisdom and quick thinking. The small and weak kingdom management by a genius prince, open its curtain here!

snippet.title: She professed herself pupil of the wise man [English Sub]
snippet.description: "Ark Earth Online" is a VRMMORPG with infinite possibilities. Dunbalf was a player, a summoner with an old appearance, one of the Nine Wise Men who founded the Arkite Kingdom. But one day, he notices something strange is going with the world. Now the game gives you a sense of taste and feel. He cannot log out, too. Furthermore, the NPCs react just like a real human. It's a sign that the game becomes an undeniable reality. Moreover, it's been 30 years have passed in this world. And for some reason, Dunbalf got an appearance of a young and beautiful girl! In order to solve the mystery of the sudden change in the world, Dunbalf sets off on a journey as Mira, Pupil of the Wise Man. What awaits at the end of her adventure?

snippet.title: Sabikui Bisco [English Sub]
snippet.description: Japan, where the "Rusty Wind" that rusts away everything is blowing violently. People have been living while being afraid of the rust, which invades the town and threatens peoples’ lives. Bisco Akaboshi is a young man of the Mushroom Guardians, which is a tribe that people hate. To save his dying master, he goes on a journey to find "Rust Eater" mushroom, the miracle medicine that purifies all rust. During his journey, he meets a beautiful young man Milo Nekoyanagi in Imihama, who’s a doctor. Milo is also looking for a way to save his dear older sister from the rust. To save the ones they love, these two boys join hands to start their new adventure.

snippet.title: Teasing Master Takagi-San S3 [English Sub]
snippet.description: Currently being serialized in Monthly Shōnen Sunday(Shogakukan), a coming-of-age comedy that has sold over 10 million copies in total! Through teasing, the distance between the two gets closer. In 2022, this will be the story of ‘first love’ that you will want to watch over! At a certain middle school, a boy named Nishikata is always teased by the girl sitting next to him, Takagi-san. Nishikata tries his best to tease her back, but she always sees right through him instead. Every day, Nishikata struggles hard to find a way to catch Takagi-san off-guard and embarrass her. Yet as the days go by, not only do the seasons change, but Nishikata as well...? On the other hand, Takagi-san, who always had the upper hand, slowly seems wavering…? Will love be shown, or will love be found out? Filled 100% to the brim with heart-pounding grins, the teasing battle finally enters its last round!

snippet.title: SAIYUKI RELOAD -ZEROIN- [English Sub]
snippet.description: Shangri-la is the disorderly continent where humans, science and witchcraft, coexist peacefully. However, due to the negative energy released upon the resurrection of the Demon Lord Gyumao, suddenly the demon race turned violence and the balance was broken. GENJO Sanzo, who was ordered by Kanzeon Bosatsu from heaven to stop the resurrection of Gyumaou, went for a journey to the west along with SON Goku, SHA Gojyo, and CHO Hakkai. On the way in this journey, Sanzo and co. encountered a man with the ability to resurrect the dead back to life named Hazel Grouse along with his servant Gat. Coming from the west, just what exactly was Hazel's objective?

snippet.title: Girls’ Frontline [English Sub]
snippet.description: The year is 2045, and the entire world has been contaminated by the Collapse Fluid. With the rise of conflicts concerning the most basic of human needs with shelter and foods, the Third World War erupted. What's left after the war is but a world in ruins. As civilisation is pushed to the brink of destruction, both war and the dwindling number of manpower has stimulated the advancement of machine technology, which resulted in the creation of "Dolls" that are created in the image of the humans. As they are manufactured in order to provide all kinds of service to humans, these dolls do not look any different from any normal human girls. However, they are a machine lifeform with abilities far surpassing any human. Those are what these "Dolls" are. As technology progresses even further, many military organizations started using Dolls that are uniquely matched with firearms, called "Tactical Dolls". Amidst all of this, the AI of the weapon manufacturing company "Sangvis Ferri" started a revolt against mankind. The PMC "Griffin & Kryuger" is ordered to investigate and stop them, and thus a battle awaits the Griffin T-Dolls. Within the G&K is a group of the most advanced T-Dolls, called the "AR Team", and along with a human commander of G&K, they will attempt to restore order to various regions, protect the safety of mankind, while also exposing the grand mystery that lies behind their fights. What awaits at the end of their fierce battle...?

snippet.title: Police in a Pod [English Sub]
snippet.description: "I had enough of this job!" After taking every single civil service exam, the only one Mai Kawai passed was one for police office work. She took the job without much thought, but it didn't take long for her to regret her decision. If she knew how exhausting the work is and how much she'd be hated for it, she would've never become a police officer. Kawai was so ready to hand out her letter of resignation and move on to her second life. But everything changes when a new director comes as her instructor. Coming to her station is "Miss Perfect" Seiko Fuji, a valedictorian from the police academy and former ace of the criminal affairs division. The rumor says that Fuji got transferred because she often used her authority to abuse younger detectives. But without even a minute of rest, Kawai immediately stuck patrolling with her. The is the beginning of office work comedy full of laughter and surprise, with a sprinkle of tears revolving around the new police officer Kawai and former ace of the criminal affairs division Fuji, along with their unique and charming police officer friends. Attendance! Here we present to you the realistic(?) tale of a new police in a pod!

snippet.title: Death March to The Parallel World Rhapsody [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Ichiro "Satwo" Suzuki is a game programmer in the middle of a death march. When he was taking a nap during his shift, he found himself in another world. Out of the corner of his eye, he sees a menu screen reminiscent of the game he was working on before his nap. He starts out as a Level 1 player, but also equipped with Map Reveal and Meteor Shower x3 skills, which were just implemented to help new players. While he is busy grasping the new reality before him, a huge army of lizards marches before him! In order to save his life, Satwo uses the Meteor Shower, which gives him a level boost up to Level 310 and a huge amount of treasure.
Be this a dream or reality, Satwo's journey in the new world begins!

snippet.title: Rent-a-Girlfriend [English Sub]
snippet.description: Kazuya Kinoshita, the worthless college student. Was dumped by his ever girlfriend after only one kiss and a month together. "I don't want to put up with this anymore." In desperation, Kazuya decides to go on a date with a girl using a certain method. And what he founds at the meeting place was— "You're Kazuya, right?" A beautiful girl, Chizuru Mizuhara smiles at him as she puts her black hair behind her ear.

snippet.title: My Roommate is a Cat [English Sub]
snippet.description: Mystery author Mikazuki would rather live in total isolation than deal with others. Getting a roommate is the last thing he’d ever do, until a stray cat sparks an idea for his next novel. After plucking the little killer off the streets, this four-legged muse inspires Mikazuki in ways he would have never expected. And for the street-wise cat, this human just opened the door to a whole new world.

snippet.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure (Season 3): Diamond is Unbreakable [English Sub]
snippet.description: It has been 11 years since the defeat of the Joestar's arch nemesis, Dio. In 1999, Jotaro Kujo went to Morioh in S City in M Prefecture, Japan, to find his grandfather, Joseph Joestar's secret child, Josuke Higashikata. However, Josuke had the same ability as Jotaro, the Stand. And as though Jotaro was summoning them, a new group of Stand Users start to make their moves. There's something in this town... Josuke rises up to save Morioh, his hometown that he grew up in.

snippet.title: This Art Club Has a Problem  [English Sub]
snippet.description:
This is this season's most fun youth love comedy in culture club!
In a normal learning institution with nothing out of the ordinary, Tsukimori Middle School, there is a normal art club.
In that club, there are Uchimaki Subaru, a boy who even if he has a lot of talent is all bent on creating his ideal "2D Wife", and Usami Mizuki, who likes such hopeless Uchimaki.
Also, there are the always sleeping President, who seemed to not mind the two of them but actually does, and the puzzling member Colette, whose only point is the somewhat strong presence.
And so, today too, some kind of problem ensues to the Art club, where those slightly sad group of people.

snippet.title: KAGINADO [English Sub]
snippet.description:
“KAGINADO Academy”.
The characters that have wringed out gallons of tears from Key fans all over the world for the past 20 years gather in this utopia... of sorts.
Now they are moving not only the fans’ emotions but the barriers dividing their worlds as well, to enjoy a new school life in a whole new world.
Free, fun, and filled with joy.
A dreamlike story is about to begin.

snippet.title: Muv-Luv Alternative [English Sub]
snippet.description:
This is the story about the bonds between people fighting in an extreme world within one of the countless parallel worlds that exist in this space-time.
In this world, human beings have been fighting against the extraterrestrial life form "BETA" for decades with puppet weapons called “Tactical Surface Fighters”, or TSF.
What kind of lives will these humans, trapped in a world on the brink of extinction, lead in the face of such a harsh fate?

snippet.title: Taisho Otome Fairytale [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The time is of the Taisho period (AD 1912-1926).

Shima Tamahiko was born into a wealthy family and grew up without ever encountering any serious problem. Yet one day, a tragic incident caused him to lose his right hand’s function, his father’s hope in him, and his mother.

Under the pretence of rehabilitation, he was sent off to the countryside, where he grew into a pessimist that loathes everything in the world.

It was then when a girl named Yuzuki came to him.
She is assigned by Tamahiko’s father to care for him, as his bride.

At first, Tamahiko finds Yuzuki annoying, but gradually, her smile and kindness start to open his heart...

Will they get along and become a true husband and wife?
And so, the curtain opens on the nostalgic Taisho love story.

snippet.title: RUMBLE GARANNDOLL [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The year is 2019, right before Japan changes over to a new era.
A dimensional rift suddenly opens up in the sky.
On the other side lies a topsy-turvy world with an alternate version of Japan called "Shinkoku Nippon." 
In this parallel world, Japan has maintained its former militarism, remaining in an eternal Showa era.
Shinkoku Nippon invaded our Japan, deploying “Genmu,” gas weapons that nullify our modern-day weapons, and giant humanoid weapons called “Garann.” 
In the blink of an eye, the invaders seized control of the government and conquered virtually all of Japan.
And thus, the "Reiwa era" never ushered in.
―――A decade later, Japan has been reborn as Genkoku Nippon, a vassal state of Shinkoku. 
Under harsh censorship, the once-thriving manga, anime, idol, and other subcultures have completely died off... or so it seemed.
However, Otaku culture is not dead!
There exists a group that directly opposes Shinkoku to protect Japan’s subcultures.
The name of this secret society is "Arahabaki." 
Their main weapons are “Garanndolls,” powered and piloted by female warriors.
And these female warriors are known by people as... 
“Battery Girls.”

snippet.title: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The world's best assassin was reincarnated into the fantasy world of sword and magic. By the Goddess request, he's planning to assassinate the hero!
Lugh, who was reincarnated as the son of a noble family, using the right that's given from the Goddess to him, he got 5 skills, and affinity with magic. Together with his experience from his previous life, he trains himself and grows to become the best asassin in the other world.
Lugh who got his hands on magic, and excelled on martial arts, met with girls who have magic powers, and he raised them to becom an assassin partner. As a preparation for the day they assassinate the hero.
Lugh was frustrated with how the organization he worked with threw him away as if he's just a tool, in his previous life.
In his new, reincarnated life, he decided to stop listening to orders, and live according to his own will.
And then, for the sake of that freedom, he just needs to do one duty, it's to carry on the hero's assassination!

snippet.title: Mieruko-Chan  [English Sub]
snippet.description:
When you see something you should not be able to see, or when you see something you are not supposed to see, what will you do?
If those things talk to you, coming to you, what will you do?
Will you run away at first sight? Will you study mysterious arts or probably rely on exorcists, and fight? The action Miko Yotsuya, a high school student, took was...
Complete ignorance!
Not seeing anything nor realising anything! This is a story of how a high school girl used her steel-hard mental power and ignoring skill to manage her way through her encounters with terrible monsters...
You're just not seeing them, but they're actually right beside you too. See?

snippet.title: SELECTION PROJECT  [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Held every summer, the national idol audition reality show "SELECTION PROJECT" is said to be the biggest gateway to success for aspiring idols.
This year marks the seventh season of the show, and the girls who have won the auditions have all made spectacular debuts, gaining popularity both in the country and abroad.
The reality show follows the girls who have won the nine regional auditions in Hokkaido, Tohoku, Northern Kanto, Southern Kanto, Kinki, Chubu, Chugoku, Shikoku and Kyushu-Okinawa through documentary footage and live show streaming as they challenge the main audition.
The only way to decide who will win is through the votes of the viewers watching the show. Who will win the audition and be crowned as the Debut Idol with the most votes?
The girls are friends and rivals in the battle for the same dream, and now the curtain rises on their youthful, passionate audition battle!

snippet.description:
The second season of the anime adaptation of the weekly webcomic "Tawawa on Monday" by Kiseki Himura.
Our salaryman's story with Ai on the train continues, along with the other couples.
Enjoy the moving and talking "Tawawa" for your melancholic Monday morning!

snippet.title: Tawawa on Monday [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The anime adaptation of the weekly webcomic "Tawawa on Monday" by Kiseki Himura.
It follows a salaryman who has a chance meeting with a girl named Ai on the train. They begin to meet every Monday on the train, with the man serving as her bodyguard on the crowded commute while they chat.
Along the way, we can see the stories of other couples as well, each with their own charms.
Enjoy the moving and talking "Tawawa" for your melancholic Monday morning!

As Douki-chan struggles to confess her feelings, her rivals, both the kohai and senpai, continue to vie for his affection.

snippet.title: I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level (S1) [English Sub]
snippet.description:
I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level

An at-home comedy about a powerful girl who doesn’t work too hard!(⋈◍ ˃ᴗ˂ ◍)。✧♡
After dying of overwork in the real world, I’m reincarnated as an immortal witch, and I spend 300 years enjoying a relaxing life. At some point, though, I end up at level 99!
All those years spent killing slimes to make the money to pay the bills gave me a ton of experience points…
Rumors of the level 99 witch spread, and soon I’m up to my ears in curious adventurers, duelist dragons, and even a monster girl calling me her mom!
“This isn’t a dojo, so don’t come here to fight me…!”

snippet.title: Last Period-The Journey To The End of The Despair- [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"Period".
They are the ones that battles Spirals, weird monsters born from despair.
Haru, a young Period that belongs to Arc End Branch #8, is on an endless adventure to put an end to the tragic cycle…
…OR SO HOW IT WAS SUPPOSED TO BE!!
All of Branch #8’s funds were stolen and they are abandoned by the Arc End HQ. Now the only Periods left there are Haru and his two friends.
Now, Haru and his friends depart on an adventure of illegal works and gacha hijinks in order to rebuild the branch!

snippet.title: The Helpful Fox Senko-san [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Nakano, a salaryman going back and forth from his apartment to an exploitative company, is suddenly visited by a 800-year-old demi-fox taking the appearance of a young girl, Senko.
She "takes care" of the exhausted Nakano by making him food, doing his laundry, and other "special services"(?) to keep him rejuvenated. With Nakano's daily life drastically changing with Senko by his side, a comedic, pampering story for those tired with modern society begins!

Teresa who came from a country named Lansenburg in Europe as overseas student, got lost right after she arrived in Japan, when she got separated with her companion that came together with her. Mitsuyoshi helped Teresa in various a course of events. He then brought her to his grandfather's Tada Coffee Shop in Ginza, Tokyo.

snippet.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure (Season 4): Golden Wind [English Sub]
snippet.description: Giorno Giovanna is a young man that lives in Naples and is the son of DIO, the nemesis of the Joestar family. When he was younger, he was oppressed and started acting out, but one day, he saved a gang member and then learned how to trust people. Bizarrely, he never forgot that and learned how to be respectful with  his own gang that straightened him out. That’s also how he started aspiring to become a Gang-Star. Now fifteen, Giorno gets in trouble with the gang Passione, which controls the Italian mafia underworld, and now, he’s being targeted.

snippet.title: (Available until 30th June 2022) Love and Lies [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"Falling in love with someone" - Do people fall into that trap without realizing it? In a near-future world where marriage partners are assigned by the government, it gives hope as well as despair. An ordinary girl, Aoi, receives a notice from the government, which assigns her to marry a random but genetically perfect boy, Sosuke.
However, she realizes she has special feeling toward her childhood friend, Yuto.
In a world where love is not free will, Aoi struggles between Sosuke and Yuto.

snippet.title: 打工吧! 魔王大人 [中字]
snippet.description: 魔王城只有三坪一房！？这是飞特族魔王大人的庶民派幻想故事！！“打工吧！魔王大人”是一部描述魔王撒旦败给勇者后，从异世界安特・伊苏拉来到现代日本东京，却受到日本社会考验而当起飞特族工作的庶民派幻想故事。而为了追击魔王来到日本的勇者艾米莉亚，也当起接线员维持生计。身为魔王与勇者，如今却挥汗工作的两人，在东京再会时究竟会发生什么事──？

snippet.title: Phantom in the Twilight [English Sub]
snippet.description:
A fantasy tale of the girl who defies fate and the “Keeper of Shadow”.
A young girl, Baileu Ton, was caught up in a mysterious incident as soon as she arrived in England.
As if being led in, she wandered into Café Forbidden, which secretly opened at midnight.
The store was surprisingly staffed by a vampire named Vlad, a werewolf named Luke, a Jiangshi named Tauryuu, and Wayne, who calls himself a ghost…
Yes, they were those what is often called “Non-human”. Moreover, these four were actually members of a secret organization working on “certain specialized cases”!
Around Ton, the quiet night of London dramatically changed. This is an unusual fantasy were many different ideas intertwined.

snippet.title: Hina Logic [English Sub]
snippet.description: On a spring day when the cherry blossoms have started to fall, the naïve princess of a small country, Lion begins her days at a school in Hokkaido. The school houses a special facility run by ALCA that trains Logicalists who protect the peace of the world. Lion has a lot of unique classmates in Class 1-S, including Nina, a Logicalist. This is the story of the energetic and adorable days the Logicalists-in-training spend together. It’s time to Trance!

snippet.title: Luck & Logic [English Sub]
snippet.description: In the year L.C.922, the demonic lords of Tetra-Heaven, the world of mythology, arrived at Septpia, the world of humans. The young logicalists belonging to the special police system ALCA, in order to protect the city and its people, "tranced" (combined) with goddesses of another world to throw themselves into the battlefield. Yoshichika Tsurugi, a civilian that led a happy life despite lacking a certain "logic", meets the beautiful goddess Athena one day and is led into an unexpected destiny. The future of the world was entrusted into the "luck" and "logic" of the young logicalists...

snippet.title: Girlfriend, Girlfriend [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The main character is Naoya, a first-year high school student.
He has just confessed his feelings to Saki--the childhood friend he had been crushing on for a long time.
Now that Saki is finally his girlfriend, Naoya is at the peak of his happiness.

However, suddenly there's a girl named Nagisa who calls out to Naoya.
She wants to be Naoya's girlfriend too.

As Naoya's heart is being swayed by a good girl like Nagisa, he has to make a decision!

This is a neo-standard romantic comedy that starts with a very unexpected choice!

snippet.title: The Aquatope on White Sand [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Kukuru Misakino, an 18 year-old girl working in an aquarium, meets Fuuka Miyazaki, a former idol from Tokyo who has lost everything and runs away from home. With each of them a problem to deal with, they spend the days together in the aquarium.
But that very aquarium is approaching its demise soon.
Their dreams and reality, loneliness and friends, bonds and discords; their new page of hope begins this summer.

snippet.title: Battle Game in 5 Seconds [English Sub]
snippet.description: A new kind of battle of abilities for a new generation is about to begin! It all started on a regular morning like any other. Akira Shiroyanagi is a high school kid who loves nothing more than konpeito candy and games. One day, he ends up in a fight due to a mysterious girl named Mion. Mion then tells the people she had gathered that they no longer officially exist in any records. They were given powers and were about to be test subjects. Akira makes up his mind to use his powers to climb up the ranks and then crush this organization. Armed with unexpected abilities and unique powers, a battle using various abilities for the new generation is about to begin!!

snippet.title: The Detective is Already Dead [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"You, be my assistant."
The young man who's prone to get mixed up in cases, Kimihiko Kimizuka, became an assistant to a self proclaimed girl detective who's as beautiful as an angel, Siesta, on a plane that's flying 10,000 metres above the ground.
For the sake of fighting the enemy of the world, the two of them spent 3 years going around the world. Their adventures passed by in a blink of an eye, and in the end, they got separated by death.
A year passed since that shocking day. Kimizuka who turned into a third grade highschooler, got immersed in normal lifestyle, and spent his days as a normal highschooler. Suddenly, a client appeared in front of Kimizuka.
Are you the detective?
Triggered with his meeting with his girl classmate, Nagisa Natsunagi, a grand story that connects the past to the present is opening its curtain once again.

snippet.title: ASSASSINATION CLASSROOM [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Season 1
A mysterious creature with the enormous power to disintegrate 70% of the moon suddenly appears and declares that he will destroy Earth by March of next year. 
But until that time, for some reason the creature says that he will teach class 3-E (where misfit students end up) of Kunugigaoka Junior High School in Japan.  
This creature possesses incredible powers that even the army can’t overcome, and leaders around the world are left with no choice but to leave it up to Class E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School to defeat the creature.
Class E’s assignment is to assassinate the mysterious creature = “Koro Sensei” (“korosenai”; cannot kill “Sensei”; teacher) and save the world from complete destruction! And they have to do it before they graduate!!
Despite these unusual circumstances, the students do their best to stay positive and grow and learn. 

Season 2
One day, a massive explosion suddenly vaporizes 70% of the moon.
Following that incident, a mysterious creature comes to a middle school classroom for some reason. It claims credit for the destruction of the moon and promises to do the same to Earth in March of the following year. Even more peculiarly, it becomes the teacher of class 3-E (where misfit students end up) of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. The creature possesses powers beyond human understanding and proves impervious to military attacks. The leaders of every nation entrust the alien’s assassination to the students of class 3-E.
The supposedly slow learners of the class are now in an “assassination classroom.” Through new experiences, they forge friendships and gain confidence in themselves.
As the second semester begins, the students feel the pressure of a literal deadline. Will their mission to assassinate the homeroom teacher succeed by graduation?!

snippet.title: Classroom of the Elite [English Sub] | S2 starting from 4th July 2022 at 21:00 (GMT+8)
snippet.description:
On the surface, Tokyo Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School is a utopia. The students enjoy an unparalleled amount of freedom, and it is ranked highly in Japan. However, the reality is less than ideal. Four classes, A through D, are ranked in order of their proficiency, and only the top classes receive favorable treatment.

Kiyotaka Ayanokoji is a student of Class D, where the school dumps its worst. There he meets the unsociable Suzune Horikita, who believes she was placed in Class D by mistake and desires to climb all the way to Class A, and the seemingly amicable class idol Kikyo Kushida, whose aim is to make as many friends as possible.

While class membership is permanent, class rankings are not; students in lower ranked classes can rise in rankings if they score better than those in the top ones. Additionally, in Class D, there are no bars on what methods can be used to get ahead. In this cutthroat school, can they prevail against the odds and reach the top?

snippet.title: What do you do at the end of the world? Are you busy? Will you save us? [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Willem, the last surviving human, now lives on floating islands among other races, away from the surface that is now inhabited by vicious creatures known as “Beasts”. After a chance encounter with a certain girl, Willem was tasked with managing a certain “weapon warehouse”, but to his surprise, the place is more like a dorm full of young girls, with the girl she met before among them. In truth, they are the “Fairy soldiers”, a short-lived race that are tasked to sacrifice their live fighting the Beasts.

"If I'm going to die in five days, would you be a little bit nicer to me?"

snippet.title: Alice & Zoroku [English Sub]
snippet.description: When trouble comes knocking, do you answer? What if that trouble is Sana, a little girl with the power to materialize anything she imagines? Old man Zoroku would prefer a quiet life, but even he can’t turn away when the escaped test subject ends up in his care. As the unlikely duo make do, their friendship takes root. But first, Sana must learn to use her powers responsibly.

snippet.title: My Next Life as a VILLAINESS: ALL ROUTES LEAD TO DOOM! [English Sub]
snippet.description: After hitting her head, Catarina Claes recalls memories of her previous life, and realized that she is now living in the world of a romance videogame that she once played. Not just that, she is now also living as the villainess of the game, who will meet her doom of exile, or even death, at the end of the game. Desperate to avoid such an ending, Catarina made various plans according to her memories of the characters in the game. Her plans, and her bumbling in general, might end up getting her more than what she expected.

snippet.title: Matoi the Sacred Slayer [English Sub]
snippet.description: Matoi Sumeragi works as a part-time shrine maiden at her friend, Yuma’s, family shrine. While Yuma is next in line to become the shrine maiden, Matoi is content to pursue a normal life. Unfortunately, “normal life” comes to a crashing halt when she and Yuma find the shrine damaged and Yuma’s parents wounded. Things only escalate as Yuma’s “Divine Possession” ritual aims for, not Yuma, but Matoi, imbuing her with the powers of a god in a fight against evil spirits.

snippet.title: Armed Girl's Machiavellism [English Sub]
snippet.description: After a bloody past, Fudo Nomura transferred into Aichi Coexistence academy, wishing for a more peaceful life. Unbeknownst to him, the girls in this school are all armed, and the boys are forced to coexist by throwing away their masculinity. Fudo’s nonchalant and uncaring attitude immediately draws the ire of the “Supreme Five Swords”, the five girls that have special permission to carry swords and reigned over the school. Armed with his glove and the training from his past, Fudo faces of with each of the Supreme Five Swords.

snippet.title: SEVEN KNIGHTS REVOLUTION -Hero Successor- [English Sub]
snippet.description:
“Do what you want. ”

There were heroes who saved the world in the past. 
Many heroes fought the forces of “Destruction” and protected this world. 

Then, time goes by… 

These heroes became history. 
The boys and girls who inherited the power of these heroes are called "Successors".
They are now fighting for the world, the destiny of which is entrusted to them. 

One of the Seven Knights, Faria, who is the top of successors,
saves a boy called Nemo while fighting against the invading army of “Destruction”.

During the fierce battle, 
Nemo awakens his power of “hero” and demonstrates his abilities as a “Successor” despite not realizing it. 

However, his “Hero”
was someone that nobody knows about or talks about. 

And that’s the moment when it starts. 
The journey of soul, intertwining the past and the present…

snippet.title: Welcome To Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Welcome to the fun-filled Netherworld!!

Due to an unexpected sequence of events, Suzuki Iruma, a good-natured boy who can't say no to others, became the grandson of Sullivan, the great Demon of the Netherworld! And so, as he is doted on by the demon Sullivan, Iruma began to attend the demon school where Sullivan is the chair-demon...

Hiding his identity as a human, Iruma only wishes to live a peaceful school life, but for one reason or another he always ended up being the center of attention. Getting into fights with elite demons, befriending an oddball(?) female demon, and furthermore, even being kept an eye on by the strict student council president!

But with his natural kindness, Iruma overcomes these troubles one after another!

snippet.title: Tokyo Revengers [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Takemichi Hanagaki is a part-time timer whose life is at rock bottom.
Later he learns that the only girlfriend he ever had in his life whom he dated back in middle school, Hinata Tachibana had been killed by the "Tokyo Manji Gang," a group of vicious criminals.
The day after he learned about the incident, Takemichi's standing on a station platform and got his back pushed onto the railroad by someone. Thinking he would die from the fall, he closes his eyes. However, when he opens it back, he somehow finds himself traveled back tweleve years into the past.
Now that he returned to the peak of his life, the middle school days twelve years ago, in order to save his girlfriend, in order to change himself who had been running away all these time, Takemichi started his Revenge on his life!

snippet.title: HETALIA World Stars [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Long time no see, everyone! Ciao Ciao!
It's-a me, Italia's here!

There are some weird beings in this world.
Some lives as short as days, others as long as hundreds of years.
They even sometimes just suddenly disappear.
Their names and personality can change,
some even appears out of nowhere just as someone somewhere randomly thought about them.
They are the strangest beings in the world,
but they are loosely accepted as normal,
and are being pushed around by their superiors.

These are the tales of such beings.

snippet.title: Super Cub [English Sub]
snippet.description:
I don't have anything. That's what I thought.
Koguma, a girl who goes to a highschool in Hokuto, Yamanashi perfecture.
She doesn't have friends, parents, or even hobbies,
and spends her days filled with nothingness.
However, after buying a Super Cub she accidentally saw in a second hand shop, her days start to change slowly.

The light novel that's being published by Kadokawa Sneakers, will start broadcasting in TV from April!

snippet.title: The Saintʼs Magic Power is Omnipotent [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Sei is a somewhat workaholic office lady in her twenties.
As she returns home after another night of overtime work, she is suddenly enveloped in light and is summoned into another world as a “Saint”. There is another girl that is also summoned together with her, a high-school girl.
A prince who appears is immediately preoccupied with the other girl and totally ignores Kei.
“Fine, I’m free to do whatever I want, right?”
As she said that, Sei leaves the royal palace. Making use of her natural love of plants, Sei started working at a medicinal plant research institute as a civilian.
With the help of Johan, the director, and Jude, the education officer, Sei starts to learn how to use magic and create potions. However, it turns out that everything Sei makes is 50% more potent, unexpectedly showing her ability as a Saint.
When Sei’s potion saved the life of Albert, a dying knight commander, rumors begins to circulate that Sei was the true Saint...

snippet.title: Combatants Will Be Dispatched! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Kisaragi Secret Society.

The infamous giant corporation, a self proclaimed evil organisation that has done many nefarious deeds, has defeated the heroes and is finally close to achieving world domination.

But, if it manages to dominate the world, the countless combatants it has will have to be laid off.

This restructuring problem has to be solved, 
and so, the upper management of Kisaragi decides to aim for a new conquest goal, the universe.

And so, Combat agent 6 and a beautiful-girl-type android, Kisaragi Alice, are dispatched to a planet that has similar environment as Earth, but,
the people there are being invaded by the "Demon Army".

snippet.title: Osamake: Romcom Where The Childhood Friend Won't Lose [English Sub]
snippet.description:
She would smile at me, and only me.
The person is Kachi Shirokusa, a very beautiful high school writer who won the Akutami Award!
And I, Maru Sueharu is just a normal high school boy. She and I are not a match in the slightest!
But I think I got a chance with her... maybe, no, definitely!
...That what I thought at first, but... you're telling me she already has a boyfriend?!
Right when I was depressed, someone came up to me. She's small, cute, and caring. Not to mention, she somehow told me that she likes me. She's my childhood friend, Shida Kuroha. And then she says...
"Let's have revenge"
The grudge of first love is deeper than the sea--- however, it's not dark! It's not muddy!
My first love revenge now begins!

snippet.title: Higehiro: After Being Rejected, I Shaved and Took in a High School Runaway [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Yoshida is an ordinary guy who was rejected hard by the woman he’d spent the last 5 years having a crush on. On his way home after getting drunk at a bar, he finds a teenage girl crouched on the side of the road...
“If you let me stay at your place, you can sleep with me.”
“You shouldn’t say that, even as a joke.”
“Then let me stay over for free.”
Before he knows it, the girl, Sayu, has moved in with him.
This is the story of a runaway teen girl and an ordinary 26-year old man.

snippet.title: ZOMBIE LAND SAGA REVENGE [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Legendary girls beyond space and time are revived as zombies and become an idol save Saga Prefecture.
"A new, sensational zombie idol-type anime"

One morning, Sakura Minamoto died in an accident.
Ten years later...
Sakura wakes up in a certain western-style house and is told by a mysterious idol producer named Kotaro Tatsumi to "become an idol with the other legendary girls and save Saga Prefecture.” As an idol group called Franchouchou, seven zombie girls pave their way to save the prefecture by doing various idol activities. However, nothing is without challenges as an idol’s existence is always as fickle as a candle. As they overcome one trouble after another due to their differences in age and generation, Franchouchou starts overturning the common sense of “idols” with their immortal bodies.
In Heisei era's last winter, Franchouchou succeeded in their first solo live concert at Karatsu City Furusato Hall Arpino and took a step forward to creating their legend. 

And then, in this Reiwa era...
Zombie Land Saga: Revenge offers a new story full of hope as Franchouchou heads to the next stage and an even brighter future.

snippet.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime: The Slime Diaries [English Sub]
snippet.description:
▶️ 《That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime》 
🔥 Full Series Playlist： 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl3_YNRvXA7O89pNP

Wonderful Slime life!

The popular TenSura 4-coma spin-off comic, "The Slime Diaries" which has sold over 500,000 copies in total is getting its very first TV anime adaptation!

"I finally got my hand on precious papers, so I decided to use it as a diary. For starters, let's write about... That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime. From that point on, my adventure... Err, adventure?"

Here we present you the "Slime life" story, depicting the daily life of the playful and humorous Rimuru along with his friends in Tempest!

snippet.title: Hand Shakers [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Handshakers, by holding hands, they gave birth to weapons from the depths of their heart.
They fight while holding Nimrod in their hands.
To have your wish granted, you have to meet Gods,
And to defeat the Gods, to stand on that place, is what Handshakers aim for, and what lies beyond it, is...

Osaka, the high school student who's good at fixing machines, Takatsuki Tazuna.
One day, he received a request for repair from a laboratory in unniversity branch.
There, he met with a girl who keeps on sleeping on a bed, Koyori.
As if guided by something, Koyori fingertips touched Tazuna, and a voice start to call upon him. 
You who have been through countless battles, and surpassed trials. 
Who received the revelation.
Who came to us, and challenged us.
You're a Handshaker.
Tazuna was confused when faced upon the parallel world that opened up  right in front of his eyes, the Ziggurat.
In a moment, Tazuna and Koyori received attacks from someone.
To meet the Gods, a number of Handshakers appear in front of Tazuna and Koyori.
While putting their own wish on the line.

snippet.title: 🤩Available again🤩 Rage of Bahamut GENESIS [English Sub]
snippet.description:
This is the magical world of Mistarcia, where humans, Gods, demons, and many different race exist together.
In the past, the silver winged Bahamut drove the world to brink of destruction,
But, humans, Gods, and demons overcame their differences, and cooperated together.
After paying a huge sacrifice, they managed to seal its power.
And then, the key for the seal was separated into two, the God key, and the demon key, both exist within their respective race.
To make sure that the key won't be able to unite again.
After that, 2000 or more years passed, and the world is in an age of peace.
And somehow, humans thought that the Bahamut is a unique existance, so they feared and worship it.
One day, the God key which is impossible to steal, was stolen by a lone girl.
The world balance gently starts to crumble.
Once the Bahamut release it's roar of survival, the world will absolutely fall into the depths of despair.
World, perish.
Someone earnestly wish for it.

snippet.title: Brave Witches [English Sub]
snippet.description:
1930s, "Neuroi" an enemy of humanity suddenly appeared and attacked Europe.
Normal weapons have trouble dealing with Neuroi.
The only ones able to fight against it are called witches, girls with special magical powers.
Brave Witches is a story that happened between Strike Witches Season 1, and Strike Witches Season 2.
In September 1944, due to the achievements made by the Joint Army centered on 501st Joint Fighter Wing, "Strike Witches", the Neuroi nest on Galia Republic airspace was destroyed, and they obtained peace in western Europe.
Seeing this as an opportunity, the Joint Army started to plan seriously for a counter attack in the center and eastern Europe frontline.
Orussia Empire built a base in Petersburg,
And was planning to issue an order to the 502nd Joint Fighter Wing, "Brave Witches", for a sortie too.
The brave witches are flying across the cold sky of Eastern Europe, while carrying humanity's hope on their back.

snippet.title: EX-ARM [English Sub]
snippet.description:
In 2014, Natsume Akira, a high school student who hates machines, wants to change his life.
But, just as he takes the first step, he is run over by a truck...

Then, in 2030, police officer Uezono Minami and the android Alma infiltrate the illegal trading venue of an unknown weapon, "EX-ARM", in the Tokyo bay Area, where they are immediately attacked by an enemy equipped with the "EX-ARM" No.08. 

They bet on their survival on EX-ARM No.00, which they stole from the enemy, but...!

snippet.title: Mushoku Tensei jobless reincarnation [English Sub]
snippet.description:
"I'm gonna go all out in this isekai!"
A 34-year-old virgin, jobless, shut-in and NEET, male. 
On the day of his parents' funeral, he was kicked out of the house, and then immediately got run over by a truck and lost his life.
To his surprise, when he woke up, he was reincarnated as a baby in an isekai of swords and magic. 
The man who once lived his life like a scum, has now become a boy named Rudeus, and swears that he'll give his best effort into life in this isekai! 
Awaiting Rudeus is a loli magician, 
a pretty girl with elf ears who uses "Boku" to refer to herself,
a violent tsundere Ojou-sama, 
and his encounters with all sorts of other people.
Moreover, he'll be fighting during his harsh adventures.
His new life is getting started!
A fantasy story of "restarting life", now begins!

snippet.title: Scar On The Praeter [English Sub]
snippet.description:
As long as we have friends, our youth continues.
We will thread the same path.
And then, we'll become a family.

Tokyo, "Special Dawn District".
The ones who protect this lawless city that's casted away by the government,
Are special people who were blessed with a special tatoo by God, Scard.
Various hardships befalls upon "Helios", "Artemis", and "Security Office".
They intersect with each other, and surpass it.
And somehow, the string that ties them, is not anger and hatred anymore, but trust.
The Scar on the Praeter is the story about them leaving their backs to each other.

snippet.title: PUI PUI MOLCAR [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The stage sets in a world where guinea pigs became cars.
The car that makes you relax: "Molcar".
Having big round eyes, curvy butts, and speedy limbs, they always explore the world with their innocent faces.
Even during traffic jams, you can be eased just by looking at the butt of that Molcar in front of you.
Even when they cause trouble, their furry cuteness will somehow make you forgive them!?
Surrounded by situations only met by cars, it's a Mol-animation filled with the cure, friendship, adventure, and furry actions!

localized.title: PUI PUI MOLCAR [English Sub]
localized.description:
The stage sets in a world where guinea pigs became cars.
The car that makes you relax: "Molcar".
Having big round eyes, curvy butts, and speedy limbs, they always explore the world with their innocent faces.
Even during traffic jams, you can be eased just by looking at the butt of that Molcar in front of you.
Even when they cause trouble, their furry cuteness will somehow make you forgive them!?
Surrounded by situations only met by cars, it's a Mol-animation filled with the cure, friendship, adventure, and furry actions!

snippet.title: I★CHU [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Aiming to be full-fledged idols, the I-Chu students enters the Etoile Vio School. 

However, with just a few words from Principal Kuma, they are off to a grim start!?
As the I-Chus strives towards their individual goals through idol activities, a question gradually formed in their mind:

What does it mean to be an idol?

The I-Chus' struggle to find the answer to this question will be captured in every shining moment of their lives. 

The coming-of-age story, begins now!

snippet.title: Kemono Jihen [English Sub]

But after meeting a strange boy who agrees to help, he discovers cursed supernatural forces at work. Little by little, Inugami uncovers the truth behind the killings and the boy who may not even be human.

snippet.title: Dr. Ramune -Mysterious Disease Specialist- [English Sub]
snippet.description:
As long as hearts exist inside people, there will always be those who suffer.
When something "strange" enters their mind, a strange disease will manifest itself in their body.
The illness, which is called a "mystery disease" is unknown to most, but it certainly exists.
There is a doctor and an apprentice who can fight the disease, which modern medicine cannot cure.

His name is Ramune.
He acts freely all the time, is foul-mouthed, and doesn’t even look like a doctor!
However, once he is confronted with the mysterious disease,
he is able to quickly uncover the root cause of his patients' deep-seated distress and cure them.

snippet.title: Armor Shop for Ladies & Gentlemen 2 [English Sub]
snippet.description: Kautz, a young man who works at an Armor Shop for Ladies and Gentlemen, was collecting materials for armor together with the shop owner Narden, the shop postergirl Lillietta, the regular customer Frealica, and the Demon King Maou. Having gathered materials effortlessly by leaving everything to Maou's powerful magic, on the way back to the shop they encountered a mysterious armor falling from the sky. What is going to happen? Traveling adventurers, welcome to the Armor Shop for Ladies and Gentlemen.

snippet.title: Suppose a Kid from the Last Dungeon Boonies Moved to a Starter Town? [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Lloyd was considered to be the weakest man in his village. But even though everyone in the village was opposed to the idea, he couldn’t give up on his dream to become a soldier, and so he headed out to the royal capital. However, no one, including Lloyd, knew their village was the “last dungeon boonies where monsters dwell”!

This is a story about encounters and the bravery of a boy who’s unaware of his invincibility.

snippet.title: Heaven’s Design Team [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Everything began, with the creation of the world.
The almighty God created everything.
Created light, water, and land.
Then, He tried to make the creatures that lived there--
that's what He thought, but it became bothersome, so He left it to subcontractors!?
Heaven's design company received a request to design creatures from God.
The animals that exist in earth, were designed by the designers from Heaven's design company.
This animal, why is it shaped this way?
This animal, why does it have this ability?
Behind the birth of animals, there's a drama where designers and engineers agonize, and enjoyed making original ideas to keep up with the God's unreasonable requests!
The creature designing job comedy, which gained a lot of response that said it's interesting and useful, is finally being adapted into anime in 2021!

snippet.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime (S2) [English Sub]
snippet.description:
▶️ 《That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime》 
🔥 Full Series Playlist： 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl3_YNRvXA7O89pNP

A country built by our main character Rimuru and the many monsters who look up to him – the Jura Tempest Federation –, through agreements and trade with neighbouring countries, is the ideal “country where humans and monsters can walk alongside."

Rimuru has a tendency to “feel kindly towards humans”, because of its former nature as a human being ...

However, there is a clear "hostility toward demons" that exists in this world.
When faced with that unreasonable reality, Rimuru makes its choice.

"Is there something that you don’t want to lose?" ――

Fans’ long-awaited Reincarnation entertainment title, let’s rush into this stormy new chapter!

＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to help the girl find something she's looking for...

snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝ 
The bullied kid, Shirahama Kenichi meets the female martial artist Fuurinji Miu and decided to change. In order to obtain the strength he needs, he enters Ryouzanpaku Dojo and began a new life surrounded by martial arts masters from various fields!!

This is the story of Kenichi's growth, both mentally and physically through his training in Ryouzanpaku and the friends and enemies he meets along the way!!

The highly praised OVA series will now air on TV!!
Watch over the number one disciple's action right in your living room!!

snippet.title: BanG Dream! 3rd Season [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Four months have passed since Popipa’s sponsored concert. After a fun filled summer, fall arrives once again. Warehouse-rehearsal, working part time, and student council meetings- Kasumi and the members of Poppin’ Party return to their usual routines… until one day, a certain poster at Live House Galaxy catches their eyes.

Elsewhere, Rokka, continuing the search for her fated band members, receives a special invitation…

The sparkling, heart-pounding stage calls once more!

Together, no dream is out of reach!

snippet.description:

snippet.title: BanG Dream! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
It’s hard to reach for the stars when you don’t know what inspires you, but thanks to a chance meeting between Kasumi and a star-shaped guitar, she finally understands her true calling! Kasumi becomes determined to form an all-girl band, and her search leads her to Saya, Arisa, Rimi, and Tae. Featuring live performances by the band Poppin’Party, Kasumi (played by the band’s lead singer, Aimi), prepares to take the stage and make her dreams of stardom come true, no matter the obstacles.

snippet.title: SAIYUKI RELOAD BLAST [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Humans and yokai, science and magic... all exist side-by-side on a peaceful continent free of all order and regulation, widely known as "Shangri-La." The balance there was shattered when the Minus Wave caused all the yokai on the continent to rampage, an event known as the "Calamity." Continuing their journey west to stop Gyumaoh's resurrection experiments, the root of all the evil on the continent, the Three Aspects are finally drawing closer to India. But the closer they get, the more pronounced the influence of the Calamity becomes, and the more intense their battles become.

snippet.title: Noblesse [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Cadis Etrama Di Raizel awakens from his 820-years slumber. He's a Noblesse, a pure-blooded Noble and protector of all Nobles.

Upon his awakening, he's reunited with his loyal butler Frankenstein who welcome him as a student in his private school; Ye Ran High School.

From that day on, Raizen lives a peaceful ordinary life along with his newly-found classmates.

However, that peaceful ordinary life suddenly comes to an end as Raizen and his friends got involved in a strange chain of events.

An assassin sent by Union, the secret organization that aims to conquer the world. 
The presence of the Nobles.
Lastly, the secret behind Raizel's 820-years slumber.

In order to protect those he needs to protect, Raizel is forced to use his absolute power...

It is, at that moment, the world began to move―.

snippet.title: MAGATSU WAHRHEIT ZUERST [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝ 
Two young boys who live in the Wahrheit Empire, where the capital city relocation plan is ongoing--
A timid Immanuel, who works hard at his job as a courier, and Leocadio, a new, naive imperial soldier. 

One works for the sake of his dear younger sister, while the other spends his day envisioning his days as a soldier in the imperial capital.

On the other hand, a prophecy foretold that “Light”, a disaster that once released ferocious beasts and annihilated life from the world, is about to be resurrected, which brings devastation to humanity once more.

Meanwhile, the fates of Immanuel and Leocadio, and the history of the empire, are about to change drastically due to a certain smuggling incident...

snippet.title: MORIARTY THE PATRIOT [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Genre: Mystery, Suspense
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
End of 19th Century. England, whose influence was steadily extending and its prosperity at its peak during the progression of industrial revolution. 
However, contrary to the development of technology, due to the rooted class system since ancient times, the nobles that account for less than 3% of the population were dominating the country.
The nobles enjoyed their privilege for granted, while the underclass had trouble even to live for another day. People’s lives were bound by classes, which were decided when they were born. 
William James Moriarty took actions to destroy such a corrupted class system, and build up an ideal country. 
Moriarty, the criminal who managed to trick even Sherlock Holmes. The revolution caused by crimes, was about to change to world…

snippet.title: Eagle Talon: Golden Spell [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
The Evil Secret Organization "Eagle Talon" has successfully revived the ancient curse; Golden Spell that allows them to control humans at their will.

"With this, we can finally fulfill our long dream of world conquest from the comfort of our home!" they thought, and successfully created various Golden Spell such as "Bladder Spell". However, someone stole the Spell development program!

If Golden Spell fell on the hand of a person with malice, the world in fall into chaos.

To take back the stolen Spell, the Eagle Talon began an investigation. However, they eventually got dragged into a giant conspiracy...

Protect! The world and Social Distance!

snippet.title: TALENTLESS NANA [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Genre: Psycological Thriller, Suspense

= TITLE SUMMARY =

"I can read people's minds. 
But I can't really read the atmosphere.
It's nice to meet you! "

A strange academy on an isolated island in the ocean. In front of student Nakajima Nanao is new transfer student Hiiragi Nana.

This is a place where boys and girls with various abilities gather

A person who manipulates flame and ice. A person who can fly freely in the air. A person who can use air as a blade to attack. 

The students are trained to fight monsters known as the "Enemies of Mankind". 

But there are a number of secrets hidden on the island, and a terrifying trap reveals its fangs.

A series of mysterious incidents....A murderer hidden in the school, classmates who disappears one by one.

A development out of anyone's expectations.  Beyond intellect and capabilities. A battle of brains. And then friendship.

A heated drama, a Battle Royale against Humanity's Enemies is about to begin!

snippet.title: Rail Romanesque [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
October, 1988. 
The country has lost most of its railroad tracks due to a huge abolition. Ohitoyoshi, the city in Kumamoto County, Kuzu area. The city became a sacred place for its railway reconstruction, successfully rebuilt its exhausted economy by promoting tourism with steam locomotive 8620 and its Railroads Hachiroku as main features, now plans to hold the First Maitetsu Festival in order to further enhance the city and build up a relationship between the railway operators from all over Japan.
The "Railroads", the humanoid modules for railway car operation and control, will be accompanied by their masters from all over Japan. Inspired by the daily meetings of the humans, they agree immediately to do something together, and organize the "Railroads Summit" led by the famous railroad "Suzusiro". They gather at "Cafe Flaxen" in front of the station and work together to add more color to the "Maitetsu Festival".

snippet.title: Wandering Witch: The Journey of Elaina [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Genre: Fantasy
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
There was a single traveler in a certain place.
Her name is Elaina.
She, a talented woman, became a “Witch”, a prominent existence among magicians at a young age.
Admiring the stories of travels she read when young, as if being swept away, she continues on her carefree and long travels.
Freely wandering this vast world, while coming into contact with incomprehensible, funny people or someone’s beautiful daily life, she as a traveler, without a set goal, repeatedly encounters various countries and people.
As well as the same number of times of—
“Please don’t mind me. I’m a traveler. I have to hurry ahead.”
Elaina, a witch like that, spins a tale of encounters and farewells.
