snippet.title: Burn the Witch [English Sub]
snippet.description:
Genre: Action, Fantasy

= TITLE SUMMARY = 

In this world, there is a "FRONT" side and a "REVERSE" side.

Historically 72% of all the deaths in London are related to dragons, fantastical beings invisible to the majority of the people.

While unknown to most, some people have been standing up to these dragons.

Only inhabitants of Reverse London who live in the hidden “reverse” side of London can see the dragons. Even then, only a selected few become qualified enough as witches or wizards to make direct contact with them.

The protagonists of the story are witch duo Noel Niihashi and Ninny Spangcole. They are protection agents for Wing Bind (WB), an organization for dragon conservation and management. Their mission is to protect and manage the dragons within London on behalf of the people.

localized.title: Burn the Witch [English Sub]
localized.description:
Genre: Action, Fantasy

= TITLE SUMMARY = 

In this world, there is a "FRONT" side and a "REVERSE" side.

Historically 72% of all the deaths in London are related to dragons, fantastical beings invisible to the majority of the people.

While unknown to most, some people have been standing up to these dragons.

Only inhabitants of Reverse London who live in the hidden “reverse” side of London can see the dragons. Even then, only a selected few become qualified enough as witches or wizards to make direct contact with them.

The protagonists of the story are witch duo Noel Niihashi and Ninny Spangcole. They are protection agents for Wing Bind (WB), an organization for dragon conservation and management. Their mission is to protect and manage the dragons within London on behalf of the people.

snippet.title: The Price of Smiles [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
In a planet far, far away from Earth, there reigns a kingdom that overflows with smiles.
Princess Yuki is 12 years old and is beginning to feel the roller coaster of emotions that come with adolescence. Each day is a mixture of tears, laughter, and dare we say giddiness. Yet the palace is full of fun, with vassals who add color to her life. There's Laila the tutor, Izana the political advisor, Harold the Grand Master, and of course Joshua, a childhood friend and close aide.

"Yuki! As long as you have the will and passion, you can do anything!" says Joshua.
"Ugh. That again?! Joshua, you need to act more regal!" she replies.

Seventeen-year-old Stella is a brilliant warrior. Even though she is cool as a cucumber, she never fails to smile. That's because smiling is essential to life.

This is a story about two girls born in a distant planet.

snippet.title: SERVAMP [English Sub]
snippet.description: ＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝Mahiru Shirota dislikes difficult things, preferring to live a simple life. But after rescuing a cat he names Kuro, life takes a turn for the complex. Kuro turns out to be a servamp—a servant vampire, named Sleepy Ash and the two form a contract. Kissing his simple life goodbye, Mahiru is pulled into the world of vampires, the seven deadly Servamps, and war. Life couldn’t be more complicated!

snippet.title: The Ryuo's Work Is Never Done! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
I opened the door, and there was a little girl standing there...

“As promised, I’ve come to be your student!”
Yaichi Kuzuryu has become the “Ryuo”, the highest title in Shogi, at the age of 16, only to find Ai Hinatsuru, a 9 year old girl in the third grade, standing outside his door.

“Huh? My student?”
“You don’t remember?”

He didn’t, but he ended up living with this elementary school anyway. Her straightforward passion began to restore something in his heart that he’d almost lost.

snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
The genius Magical Law Executor Muhyo (Tooru Muhyou) and his assistant Roji (Jirou Kusano) have abilities to exorcise the evil spirits and fallen souls, who caused trouble to humans and cause accident.

One day, Enchu, Muhyo's rival during his time at the Magical Law School, appear in front of Muhyo, and a new story had unfold.
　
Season 2 now unfolding!

snippet.title: THE GOD OF HIGH SCHOOL [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Mori Jin has proclaimed himself the strongest high schooler. 
His life changes when he's invited to participate in ""God of High School,"" a tournament to determine the strongest high schooler of all. 
He's told that if he wins, any wish he makes will be granted... 
All the participants are powerful contenders who fight their hardest for their own wishes. 
What awaits them at the end of the tournament? 
A chaotic battle between unbelievably strong high school students is about to begin!

snippet.title: Goblin Slayer [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
"I'm not going to save the world. I'm just going to kill goblins."

In a guild on the frontier, there existed someone rare—who rose to a silver-ranked adventurer just by hunting goblins.

A priestess, a newly minted adventurer, joins her first party only to find themselves in a pinch. The one who saved them, was none other than the man who was known as the Goblin Slayer.

Using all means necessary and sparing no effort, he only eliminates goblins. The priestess who ends up dragged around by him, the Guild receptionist who’s indebted to him, and his cattle-ranching childhood friend who waits for him. And upon hearing rumours about him, an elven girl appears with a request…

＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝

The story is set in Mamuceaster, where shiny sand and its crystal shiny stone are used to run the city. The girls who practice magic by spells and melodies via shiny sand and shiny stone are known as a “Witch”. With singing and defeating monsters, they are longed by crowds and giving hopes to everyone.

Flora Girls Academy, founded by the Witch of the Dawn, is a school for training witches. 
In the hope to become a great witch, Tiara arrives at the academy.

“Please allow me to enroll in this academy … huh!?”

snippet.title: Monster Girl Doctor [English Sub]
snippet.description:
简体中文字幕播放清单: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwLSw1_eDZl2kRY8vEPyAWNhsDilEGeyc

＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Welcome to the town of Lindworm, where humans and monsters coexist and rookie doctor Glenn carries out some…risqué medical examinations!

Whether probing deep into the gills of a mermaid,
suturing the thigh of a flesh golem,
helping a harpy lay an egg,
or palpating each and every scale of a dragon…

No matter how different their looks, bodies, and properties, Glenn devotes his all to saving them—and, in the process, winds up in some pretty dangerous liaisons…? But don’t worry—it’s all just a part of his medical exams! 

Thus Glenn kicks off another day at the office, even as his lamia assistant Sapphee is about to wrap her tail around his neck!

It’s the world’s first medical fantasy that takes a deep dive into the lives and anatomy of monster girls!

snippet.title: [Việt sub] One Punch Man
snippet.description:
Saitama là một người đàn ông lấy nghề anh hùng làm thú vui.
Sau 3 năm tập luyện, anh có được thứ sức mạnh vô địch thiên hạ, có khả năng hạ gục bất cứ kẻ thù nào chỉ với một cú đấm.
“Có sức mạnh vượt trội cũng thật nhàm chán”
Trước một siêu anh hùng mạnh nhất nhưng vô cảm, kẻ thù mới lại xuất hiện.
“Liệu ai có thể khiến ta trở nên nghiêm túc được đây?”

snippet.title: One Punch Man [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Saitama is a hero who only became a hero for fun. After three years of “special” training, though, he’s become so strong that he’s practically invincible. In fact, he’s too strong—even his mightiest opponents are taken out with a single punch, and it turns out that being devastatingly powerful is actually kind of a bore. 
With his passion for being a hero lost along with his hair, yet still faced with new enemies every day, how much longer can he keep it going?

snippet.title: [MalaySub] A3!
snippet.description:
“Puan Pengarah, tolong bantu kami berkembang!”
Di Tokyo, terdapat tempat yang bernama Laluan Velude. Daerah yang dipenuhi dengan persembahan serta kumpulan pementasan berbakat. Izumi Tachibana merupakan bekas pelakon pentas, menerima surat menyatakan “Penuh dengan hutang! Tiada pelanggan! Cuma satu pelakon saja!” Itu menjelaskan situasi yang dihadapi oleh kumpulan pementasan yang terkenal dahulu, Syarikat Mankai. Tugasnya adalah mengembalikan zaman kegemilangan dengan menjadi pemilik baharu serta pengarah kepada kumpulan tersebut

snippet.title: [MalaySub] ARGONAVIS from BanG Dream!
snippet.description:
Ren Nanahoshi merupakan pelajar kolej yang tidak begitu mahir berkomunikasi bersama orang lain. Dia masih merasakan debaran dalam hatinya apabila melihat persembahan langsung kumpulan muzik sewaktu dia kecil lalu meluangkan masa keseharian mencari identiti dirinya.
Satu hari kemudian, seorang remaja bernama Yuuto dan Wataru melihat bakat menyanyi Ren semasa dia berkaraoke seorang diri. Mereka berdua mengatakan: “Inilah takdir. Mari tubuhkan kugiran!” Ren terus melarikan diri namun takdir telah mula melangkah begitu jugalah pengembaraan mereka bersama.

snippet.title: [MalaySub] Diary of our Days at the Breakwater
snippet.description: Hina Tsurugi, yang baru berpindah dari bandar ke luar bandar. Dia lebih suka buat kerja di dalam rumah dan geli pada haiwan. Dia bercadang nak masuk ke dalam kelab kraf tangan dan nikmati hari-hari persekolahan. Namun, ketika dia berjumpa Yuki Kuroiwa ketika bersiar-siar, dia telah masuk ke dalam sebuah kelab yang bernama "Kelab Tetobu". Di kelab itu, dia mula memancing. Apa yang akan terjadi pada kehidupan sekolah Hina ketika di sekeliling oleh kawan-kawan yang pelik?

snippet.title: [MalaySub] ARTE
snippet.description: Pada abad ke-16 di Florence. Arte dilahirkan sebagai anak perempuan bangsawan. Namun beliau tertarik dengan bidang seni dan ukiran patung di sekelilingnya sejak dari kecil lagi. Impiannya adalah untuk menjadi seorang pelukis sendiri, tetapi pada masa ini dia tidak dapat menerima bahawa wanita tidak boleh menjadi pelukis tambahan pula daripada golongan bangsawan. Hal ini telah mendesak Arte dengan membuat keputusannya untuk menyahut cabaran untuk mencapai impian hidupnya.

snippet.title: [MalaySub] Ascendance of a Bookworm S1+S2
snippet.description:
Menjadi Penjaga Kuil buku!
Seorang pustakawan yang gemarkan buku, Urano Motosu mati dalam sebuah kemalangan yang tak disangka. Bila dia sedar, Urano telah dihidupkan semula sebagai seorang anak perempuan kepada askar, bernama Myne.
Di dunia itu bangsawan ada kuasa magis dan jarang rakyat biasa lahir dengan kuasa magis. Mereka tak boleh selamat tanpa ada alat magis yang menyerab kuasa yang ada tanpa had tersebut.
Pada masa itu, Myne menjumpai sebuah kuil pustakawan di upacara keagamaan dan meminta pada ketua paderi itu untuk menjadi perintis menjaga kuil itu. Selepas itu, Myne dilantik sebagai Perintis Biru bagi menjaga kuil itu.
Namun, tak semua sanggup menggunakan jubah biru itu yang telah diberikan oleh bangsawan bagi menjaga tempat tersebut. Myne menghadapi kesukaran di dalam perjalannya.

Di dunia itu bangsawan ada kuasa magis dan jarang rakyat biasa lahir dengan kuasa magis. Mereka tak boleh selamat tanpa ada alat magis yang menyerab kuasa yang ada tanpa had tersebut.
Pada masa itu, Myne menjumpai sebuah kuil pustakawan di upacara keagamaan dan meminta pada ketua paderi itu untuk menjadi perintis menjaga kuil itu. Selepas itu, Myne dilantik sebagai Perintis Biru bagi menjaga kuil itu.
Namun, tak semua sanggup menggunakan jubah biru itu yang telah diberikan oleh bangsawan bagi menjaga tempat tersebut. Myne menghadapi kesukaran di dalam perjalannya.

snippet.title: [MalaySub] Shachibato! President, It's Time for Battle
snippet.description:
Pusat dunia, Gate Pier...
Dulu dunia ini cuma alam magik yang bertanah tandus tanpa penghujung.
Seorang dewi turun dari langit dan “Gerbang” yang gergasi muncul di langit.
Orang ramai mendapat tahu tentang kewujudan tenaga ajaib yang mampu menampung dunia ini iaitu Kirakuri. Berlalunya hari dan bulan, Gate Pier membangun menjadi sebuah Bandar.
Pemburu harta karun yang mengkhusu dalam pengumpulan Kirakuri di dalam “Gerbang” mula muncul.  Tenaga ajaib yang menampung dunia diamanah kepada Pemburu Kirakuri.
Pada suatu hari, watak utama Minato tiba-tiba diseru oleh kawan semenjak kecil dia, Yutoria.
Dengan harapan yang kecil, Minato menuju ke tempat itu lalu diluahkan perasaan oleh Yutoria…
“Aku rasa… Kau sesuai menjadi seorang presiden!”
Dengan itu Minato mewarisi ayah dia dan kehidupan dia sebagai Presiden Pengembar bermula.

snippet.title: [MalaySub] Shironeko Project
snippet.description:
Pada zaman dulu, di langit ada Kerajaan Putih dan di tanah Kerajaan Hitam.
Mereka saling melindungi “keseimbangan” sambil meneruskan “kitaran hidup”.

Pada suatu hari, seorang pemuda menggali kubur di kampong yang dibinasakan olh raksasa Kerajaan Hitam. Skears, calon Raja Kegelapan sebelum ini tiba di tempat pemuda itu.
Pemuda yang dijumpai oleh Skears, berazam untuk menjadi Putera Kegelapan demi menukar dunia ini.

Sementara itu, Iris, Raja Cahaya yang merupakan Dewi Pelindung Kerajaan Putih,
merasa bimbang kerana “keseimbangan”  akan dirosakkan.

Berita mengenai kemunculan Bal yang mengacau keseimbangan dalam datang.
Raja Kegelapan dari Kerajaan Hitam datang memohon untuk bekerjasama demi menghapuskan Bal yang menyakitkan hati dia.

Raja Cahaya, Iris telah bertemu dengan Putera Pengutus Hitam,
lalu mereka berdu pun berjanji untuk bersama-sama membawakan keamanan kepada dunia.

Namun janji antara mereka berdua akan dirosakkan oleh Raja Kegelapan.

Janji antara mereka berdua dan dosa permulaan iaitu menghancurkan dunia.
Kisah menuju ke akar umbi Zero bakal membuka tirai…

snippet.title: Diary of our Days at the Breakwater [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Hina Tsurugi just moved from the city to rural area. She's an indoor girl and doesn't like dealing with living things.

Hina planned on joining in the handcraft club and enjoy her school life there, but one day she met Yuki Kuroiwa during a walk. She was then made to join a strange "Breakwater Club" and started fishing. Surrounded by club members with different presonalities, what will Hina's high school life become?

snippet.title: Shironeko Project ZERO CHRONICLE [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
A long, long time ago... the Kingdom of White that existed in the sky, and the Kingdom of Black on earth, circulated in equilibrium.

At one point in the Kingdom of Black, a young man was digging a tomb in a village that was destroyed by demons.  A former candidate to the throne - Skiers - appears before the young man. He, who was found by Skiers, decides that he will change the world by becoming the Prince of Darkness.

On the other hand, the guardian goddess, the King of the Kingdom of White, Iris, is worried that the balance between light and darkness will be broken.

The existence that threatens to unhinge this balance - Ba'al - appears. 

The King of Darkness, of the Kingdom of Darkness, offers up a pledge to defeat Ba'al.

The King of Light meets with the Prince of Darkness, who acts as a messenger from the Kingdom of Darkness, and they ＜Promise＞ to work to bring about a peaceful world together.

However, this promise was trampled on by the King of Darkness. 
The ＜Promise＞ between the two, and the sin of destroying the world. 

This is the beginning of a story that leads to the source of everything!

snippet.title: Shachibato! President, It's Time for Battle! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝ 
The heart of the world - Gatopia. Formerly, the world was a wasteland that continued to be so for ages... 

Then, at one point, a goddess descended from the sky, and a giant gate materialised. People who went into the Gates found Sparkling Crystals, the mysterious energy that has been sustaining the world. Time goes by, and Gatopia started developing as a city. Some people started collecting Sparkling Crystals in dungeons as a professional job, and they are called "treasure hunters". The mysterious energy that is sustaining the world, is now into the hands of Sparkling Crystal hunters.

One day, our MC Minato was suddenly called out by his childhood friend Yutoria. He came to meet her while kind of expecting a confession, only to be told that… “I've always thought that you're suited to become the president of a company!” 

And that's how he succeeded his family business and started his life of adventure.

snippet.title: Ascendance of a Bookworm S2 [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
I’ll become a temple maiden for the sake of books!

Motosu Urano, a college girl who loves books even more than her three meals a day, was reincarnated as a soldier’s daughter named Maine, into a world where there are no books. There was a low literacy rate among commoners, and books made of parchment were expensive and belonged only to the nobles.

And so, Maine made a decision—“If there are no books, then I’ll just have to make them!”

After much trial and error, Maine met the merchant Benno, and in order to become a merchant apprentice, completed the plant-based paper. However, Maine’s body was getting eroded by the “Fever of the Devouring…”

In this world where the nobles possess magical powers, ordinary citizens are sometimes born with magic. This is known as the “Devouring”. Without magical items to absorb the ever-increasing magical power, one will not be able to live for long. 

Then, Maine, who discovered the temple’s library during the baptism, made a direct request to become an apprentice temple maiden to the bishop. After much ado, it was decided that Maine would become a blue-robed apprentice temple maiden who would devote her magic to the temple.

However, there were many who were unhappy with Maine, of commoner birth, for wearing the blue robes that were originally meant for nobility. Maine faces a difficult path.

Her problematic servants, and the hierarchical society of the temple…

The common sense and practices of the temple that differed from that of when she was Urano, and even from the neighbourhood where she lived, stands in Maine’s way.

Will the day come when Maine can read as much as she wants!?
And, will Maine ever be able to make a book!?

snippet.title: ARTE [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
The stage is set in early 16th century Florence, Italy.  The birthplace of the arts in the Renaissance period, painting, sculpting and the like thrived. Arte, a young lady born into nobility in an era with such blossoming energy, became absorbed into the art of painting the moment she became aware. However, in an age where the concept of an ""independent woman"" did not exist, girls were not allowed to even pursue their hobbies. In defiance of her mother's wishes for her to be wedded and live a proper life, Arte looks for an Atelier willing to take her in as a painter's apprentice. If she is going to have regrets anyway, she will do it on her own terms!

Struggling against current trends, a young lady on the path to become a professional painter, here begins Arte's story.

snippet.title: A3! [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
On the outskirts of Tokyo lies a street known as "Velude Way", the sacred street where many theatres call home. Armed with only a letter, Tachibana Izumi visits the Mankai Company, a troupe theater company that was founded by her father.

Now theater is deserted and there has been no news of her father since 8 years ago. Without an audience, and only a single member in the troupe, the debtors are at the door. 

Can Izumi somehow revive the former troupe? Where will fate lead Mankai Company?

BOFURI: I Don't Want to Get Hurt, so I'll Max Out My Defense
怕痛的我, 把防御力点满就对了

2020 Ongoing Winter Anime!

*｡☆Weekly Updates at 22:30 every Wednesday ☆。*ﾟ

= TITLE SUMMARY =

There's a super strong newbie in the world of the VRMMO "NewWorld Online"!? 

The one who can render all attacks useless, and completely crush all monsters and users with a "Lethal Poison" skill! 

The one with an unusual one of a kind fighting posture, termed as the "Moving Fortress", or the "Final Demon King". 

And the true face behind this player, is none other a newbie Bishoujo! 

Maple, by recommendation from Sally, starts playing NewWorld Online. But being completely new to the game, she allocates all of her ability points into her defense power (VIT). 

And though these little pesky monsters are really annoying but…

It… doesn't hurt!? 

Getting plummeled by monster and yet completely unscathed.. And what's even luckier is being able to acquire the ultimate counter attack skill! 

With an unusual ally joining the team, Maple gradually gets stronger. The adventure (without any damage) , is about to begin!

snippet.title: 如果有妹妹就好了。 [中字]
snippet.description:
只要有个妹妹的话
我的人生就永远处在巅峰的说，
为什么我没有妹妹呢…..

只写关于妹妹题材的妹控小说家˙羽岛伊月的身边围绕着，明明是天才作家却十足变态的可儿那由多、女大学生白川京、插画家屁桃、鬼畜税金救星大野艾希莉等个性丰富的人物。
伊月他们虽然各有各的烦恼，但依旧过着小说照写，游戏照玩，酒照喝，税照报的热闹生活。而默默温暖在旁守护他们的伊月家没有血缘关系的弟弟千寻，其实隐藏着某个天大的秘密。
开心却带着心酸的天才与凡人与变态所展开的青春爱情搞笑群像剧，揭幕了！

snippet.title: A Sister's All You Need [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
Every day is full of fun. But something is missing. "My life would be amazing if only I had a little sister. Why don’t I have a little sister...?" These are the musings of little sister-lover and novelist Itsuki Hashima, who only writes works featuring little sisters. Around him gather a number of unique people: genius author/pervert Nayuta, female college student Miyako, illustrator Puriketsu, and the brutish tax accountant Ashley. Each of them hold their own worries, but live their peaceful daily lives while writing novels, playing video games, drinking alcohol, and filing their tax returns.

snippet.title: In Search of the Lost Future [English Sub]
snippet.description:
＝＝＝＝Title Summary＝＝＝＝
When the student council gets worried about the strange events happening at Uchihama Academy, they enlist the aid of the Astronomy Club to crack the case. One night, club member Sou Akiyama is rocked by a sudden earthquake—and an encounter with a mysterious girl. In the blink of an eye, Sou’s fate—along with the fates of all the pretty girls in his club—being to change dramatically!

Null & Peta

Introduction

Genius girl Null suddenly lost her sister in an accident.
But don't worry!
Using her wealth of knowledge, she successfully rebuilt her sister as a robot!
However, after bringing her back she was a little different than before.
The story of Null and her Robot sister Peta will unfold in a disaster-filled comedy about sisterly love!
"Sis! Your plug came out!"

snippet.title: Danganronpa 3: The End of Hope’s Peak High School [English Sub]

localized.title: Danganronpa 3: The End of Hope’s Peak High School [English Sub]

snippet.title: DANGANRONPA The Animation [English Sub]
snippet.description:
The Hope's Peak Academy promises success in life just by graduating. However, only a very limited number of people are allowed to enter this school. Only students with outstanding talents, known as the "ultimates", were allowed to enter.

And now, a boy is about to set foot in this school. The protagonist, Makoto Naegi, is an ordinary boy with no special characteristics. He is the only one who was allowed to enter the academy by lottery, and he is the only one with Ultimate Lucky Student. Naegi cannot hide his excitement at his good fortune and new environment. But what awaits him is a situation he never imagined.

A shock runs through his body as soon as he sets foot inside the school gates. The next time Makoto wakes up, he finds himself locked in a sealed school building with 14 other students.

Furthermore, Monokuma, who calls himself the headmaster, appeared in front of Naegi and his friends, who were puzzled by the sudden situation. He tells them. From now on, they will live here for the rest of their lives. If they want to graduate from the academy, they must kill their fellow students.
